p3-1.definition-english: To fight or struggle; conflict
p3-1.sentence: 士兵们勇敢地和敌人战斗。(The soldiers bravely fought against the enemy.)
complex: 因为敌人来了,所以士兵们马上开始战斗。(Because the enemies came, the soldiers immediately began to fight.)
电影里的英雄一边大叫一边战斗。(The hero in the movie shouted while fighting.)
他不但参加了格斗比赛,而且得了冠军。(He not only took part in the combat competition, but also won the championship.)

p3-1.definition-english: To hurry; to catch up with
p3-1.sentence: 我们要赶快出门,不然会迟到。(We must hurry out the door, or we will be late.)
complex: 虽然时间不多了,但是我们还是赶上了公车。(Although there wasn't much time left, we still managed to catch the bus.)
妹妹一边穿鞋一边催我赶快出门。(My sister put on her shoes while urging me to hurry out the door.)
妈妈不但赶紧收拾行李,而且提醒我们别忘了带雨伞。(Mom not only hurriedly packed the luggage, but also reminded us not to forget the umbrella.)

p3-1.definition-english: Achievement, merit, or skill
p3-1.sentence: 他做完功课才可以看电视。(He can only watch TV after finishing his homework.)
complex: 虽然功课很多,但是他还是每天认真完成。(Although there is a lot of homework, he still finishes it carefully every day.)
因为他每天努力练习,所以终于成功了。(Because he practiced hard every day, he finally succeeded.)
他不但功课做得好,而且功夫也练得很棒。(He not only does his homework well, but also practices kung fu very well.)

words: 科技 (kē jì, science and technology)
p3-1.definition-english: A branch of learning; subject; science
p3-1.sentence: 我最喜欢的科目是科学。(My favorite subject is science.)
complex: 虽然科学很难,但是我还是很感兴趣。(Although science is difficult, I am still very interested in it.)
因为他喜欢做实验,所以科学是他最喜欢的科目。(Because he likes doing experiments, science is his favorite subject.)
他一边做科学实验,一边记录结果。(He recorded the results while doing the science experiment.)

p3-1.definition-english: Will; about to; a military general
p3-1.sentence: 他将来想成为一名科学家。(In the future, he wants to become a scientist.)
complex: 因为他很喜欢历史故事,所以将来想成为一名将军。(Because he loves history stories, he wants to become a general in the future.)
他一边看书,一边想象自己将来当科学家的样子。(He read a book while imagining what he would look like as a scientist in the future.)
那位将军不但很勇敢,而且非常聪明。(That general is not only very brave, but also very clever.)

words: 当时 (dāng shí, at that time)
p3-1.definition-english: When; to serve as; should
p3-1.sentence: 过马路的时候要当心车辆。(You must be careful of vehicles when crossing the road.)
complex: 虽然当时天气很热,但是我们还是完成了比赛。(Although the weather was very hot at that time, we still finished the race.)
他一边当心车辆,一边慢慢走过马路。(He watched out for vehicles while slowly crossing the road.)
他不但当过班长,而且做得很好。(He not only served as class monitor, but also did a great job.)

p3-1.definition-english: To manage; a government department; company
p3-1.sentence: 爸爸在一家大公司工作。(Dad works at a large company.)
complex: 虽然公司很远,但是爸爸每天都准时上班。(Although the company is far away, Dad goes to work on time every day.)
因为爸爸是司机,所以他每天都开车送客人。(Because Dad is a driver, he drives passengers every day.)
那位司令不但很严格,而且很关心士兵。(That commander is not only strict, but also cares about the soldiers.)

p3-1.definition-english: To hope; to wish for
p3-1.sentence: 我希望明天是个晴天。(I hope tomorrow will be a sunny day.)
complex: 虽然天气不好,但是我希望明天能出去玩。(Although the weather is bad, I hope I can go out to play tomorrow.)
因为他很想进步,所以他希望老师多给他一些练习。(Because he wants to improve, he hopes the teacher will give him more practice.)
他一边写信,一边希望朋友快点回信。(He wrote the letter while hoping his friend would reply soon.)

words: 盼望 (pàn wàng, look forward to)
p3-1.definition-english: To look toward; to hope; to expect
p3-1.sentence: 姐姐用望远镜观察星星。(My sister uses a telescope to observe the stars.)
complex: 因为哥哥喜欢看星星,所以他买了一个望远镜。(Because my brother likes watching stars, he bought a telescope.)
他一边用望远镜看星星,一边记录笔记。(He used the telescope to look at the stars while taking notes.)
我们不但盼望假期快点来,而且已经开始计划旅行了。(We not only look forward to the holidays coming soon, but also have started planning our trip.)

p3-1.definition-english: Army; military; soldier
p3-1.sentence: 我的舅舅是一名军人。(My uncle is a soldier.)
complex: 虽然训练很辛苦,但是军人们从不放弃。(Although the training is very tough, the soldiers never give up.)
军队里的军人一边跑步一边喊口号。(The soldiers in the army shouted slogans while running.)
他不但是一名军人,而且是一位受人尊敬的将军。(He is not only a soldier, but also a respected general.)

p3-1.definition-english: To guard; to protect; defense
p3-1.sentence: 我们应该保持教室的卫生。(We should keep the classroom clean.)
complex: 虽然任务很危险,但是军人们还是勇敢地保卫国家。(Although the mission is dangerous, the soldiers still bravely defend the country.)
因为教室很脏,所以老师叫我们注意卫生。(Because the classroom is dirty, the teacher told us to pay attention to hygiene.)
这颗卫星不但能拍照,而且能传送信息。(This satellite can not only take photos, but also transmit information.)

p3-1.definition-english: To practice; to train; to drill
p3-1.sentence: 小明每天放学后练习弹钢琴一个小时。(Xiao Ming practices playing the piano for an hour every day after school.)
complex: 虽然弹钢琴很难,但是小明每天坚持练习。(Although playing the piano is difficult, Xiao Ming practices every day without fail.)
因为运动员每天训练,所以他们的身体很强壮。(Because the athletes train every day, their bodies are very strong.)
他一边听音乐,一边练习写字。(He practiced writing while listening to music.)

p3-1.definition-english: To strive; to exert oneself
p3-1.sentence: 只要努力学习,成绩就会进步。(As long as you study hard, your grades will improve.)
complex: 因为他想考第一名,所以每天都很努力读书。(Because he wants to come in first place, he studies very hard every day.)
他一边练习,一边努力记住生字。(He worked hard to memorize the new words while practicing.)
他不但很努力,而且很聪明。(He is not only very hardworking, but also very clever.)

words: 篇章 (piān zhāng, chapters and sections)
p3-1.definition-english: A piece of writing; measure word for articles and essays
p3-1.sentence: 老师叫我们写一篇关于家乡的作文。(The teacher asked us to write an essay about our hometown.)
complex: 虽然这篇作文很长,但是我很快就写完了。(Although this essay is very long, I finished writing it quickly.)
他一边看书,一边抄写喜欢的篇章。(He copied down his favorite passages while reading the book.)
这篇文章不但有趣,而且很有意义。(This article is not only interesting, but also meaningful.)

p3-1.definition-english: To repeat; to recover; to reply
p3-1.sentence: 考试前,我们要认真复习课文。(Before the exam, we must review the texts carefully.)
complex: 虽然功课很多,但是我还是抽时间复习课文。(Although there is a lot of homework, I still make time to review the texts.)
因为我给朋友写了信,所以他很快就回复了我。(Because I wrote a letter to my friend, he replied to me quickly.)
这道题不但很复杂,而且答案也很难懂。(This question is not only complicated, but also the answer is hard to understand.)

words: 交朋友 (jiāo péng you, make friends)
p3-1.definition-english: To hand over; to exchange; to interact; to make friends
p3-1.sentence: 小华在新学校交了很多新朋友。(Xiao Hua made many new friends at the new school.)
complex: 虽然他很害羞,但是他还是交到了很多新朋友。(Although he is shy, he still made many new friends.)
因为放学时间到了,所以路上的交通变得很拥挤。(Because school has ended, the traffic on the road has become very congested.)
他们一边吃点心,一边交换今天发生的趣事。(They exchanged funny stories from today while eating snacks.)

words: 举行 (jǔ xíng, hold an event)
举例 (jǔ lì, give an example)
p3-1.definition-english: To raise; to lift; to hold (an event)
p3-1.sentence: 学校下星期将举行运动会。(The school will hold a sports day next week.)
complex: 因为老师问了一个问题,所以同学们都举手回答。(Because the teacher asked a question, the students all raised their hands to answer.)
他一边举手,一边大声说出答案。(He raised his hand while loudly saying the answer.)
学校不但举行了运动会,而且还举行了绘画比赛。(The school not only held a sports day, but also held a painting competition.)

words: 翻书 (fān shū, flip through a book)
p3-1.definition-english: To turn over; to flip; to translate
p3-1.sentence: 妹妹喜欢一页页地翻书看图画。(My little sister likes to flip through the pages to look at the pictures.)
complex: 虽然这本书很厚,但是妹妹还是很快地把它翻完了。(Although this book is very thick, my little sister still flipped through it quickly.)
他一边翻书,一边看里面的图画。(He looked at the pictures inside while flipping through the book.)
姐姐不但会说英语,而且能把课文翻译成中文。(My sister can not only speak English, but also translate the text into Chinese.)

p3-1.definition-english: To become; to succeed; achievement
p3-1.sentence: 他长大后成为了一名医生。(When he grew up, he became a doctor.)
complex: 虽然过程很辛苦,但是他最后终于成功了。(Although the process was very hard, he finally succeeded in the end.)
因为他每天认真学习,所以成绩越来越好。(Because he studies seriously every day, his grades are getting better and better.)
她不但成为了班长,而且还当上了合唱团的队长。(She not only became the class monitor, but also became the leader of the choir.)

words: 为了 (wèi le, in order to)
p3-1.definition-english: For; because of; to be; to act as
p3-1.sentence: 为了身体健康,他每天早上跑步。(In order to stay healthy, he jogs every morning.)
complex: 虽然天气很冷,但是他还是为了健康每天晨跑。(Although the weather is very cold, he still jogs every morning for the sake of his health.)
因为他很努力,所以他成为了全班第一名。(Because he worked hard, he became the top student in the class.)
妈妈一边做家务,一边为我们准备晚餐。(Mom prepared dinner for us while doing housework.)

p3-1.definition-english: To wish; to be willing; a wish or desire
p3-1.sentence: 妈妈问我愿不愿意帮忙洗碗。(Mom asked whether I was willing to help wash the dishes.)
complex: 因为妈妈很忙,所以她愿意让我帮忙洗碗。(Because Mom is very busy, she is willing to let me help wash the dishes.)
妹妹一边吹蜡烛,一边许下心愿。(My little sister blew out the candles while making a wish.)
他不但愿意帮助同学,而且做事很认真。(He is not only willing to help his classmates, but also does things very seriously.)

p3-1.definition-english: Real; actual; solid; in fact
p3-1.sentence: 这道题其实并不难。(This question is actually not difficult.)
complex: 虽然这个故事听起来很奇怪,但是它其实是真的。(Although this story sounds strange, it is actually true.)
他一边做实验,一边记录实际的结果。(He recorded the actual results while doing the experiment.)
这个方法不但实际,而且很有效。(This method is not only practical, but also very effective.)

p3-1.definition-english: A class or lesson; a course
p3-1.sentence: 上课的时候,大家都专心听讲。(During class, everyone listens attentively.)
complex: 虽然今天的课很难,但是同学们都听得很认真。(Although today's lesson is difficult, the students all listened very attentively.)
因为忘记带课本,所以他上课时看不到课文。(Because he forgot to bring his textbook, he couldn't see the text during class.)
这堂课不但有趣,而且让我们学到了很多知识。(This lesson is not only interesting, but also taught us a lot of knowledge.)

words: 做作业 (zuò zuò yè, do homework)
p3-1.definition-english: To do; to make; to act as
p3-1.sentence: 星期六下午,妈妈教我做饭。(On Saturday afternoon, Mom taught me how to cook.)
complex: 虽然做作业很花时间,但是他每天都按时完成。(Although doing homework takes a lot of time, he finishes it on time every day.)
因为妈妈生病了,所以爸爸今天负责做饭。(Because Mom is sick, Dad is in charge of cooking today.)
妈妈一边做饭,一边教我怎么切菜。(Mom taught me how to cut vegetables while cooking.)

words: 一件事 (yī jiàn shì, one matter)
一件衣服 (yī jiàn yī fu, one piece of clothing)
p3-1.definition-english: A piece; an item; measure word for clothing and matters
p3-1.sentence: 这件衣服是奶奶送给我的生日礼物。(This piece of clothing was a birthday gift from Grandma.)
complex: 因为天气变冷了,所以妈妈给我买了一件新外套。(Because the weather turned cold, Mom bought me a new jacket.)
爸爸一边整理文件,一边跟同事讨论工作。(Dad discussed work with his colleague while organizing documents.)
这件事不但很重要,而且需要马上处理。(This matter is not only important, but also needs to be dealt with right away.)

p3-1.definition-english: To read; to study; to attend (school)
p3-1.sentence: 弟弟每天晚上都会读书半小时。(My younger brother reads books for half an hour every night.)
complex: 虽然故事书很厚,但是弟弟还是坚持读完了。(Although the storybook is very thick, my younger brother still persisted and finished reading it.)
他一边读书,一边做笔记。(He took notes while reading.)
姐姐不但爱读书,而且很会朗读课文。(My sister not only loves reading, but also reads texts aloud very well.)

words: 再一遍 (zài yī biàn, once more)
p3-1.definition-english: A time or round (of doing something); all over, everywhere
p3-1.definition-chinese: 量词,表示动作次数；到处
p3-1.sentence: 老师让我们把课文抄写三遍。(The teacher asked us to copy the text three times.)
complex: 虽然这篇课文很长,但是老师还是让我们抄写了三遍。(Although this text is very long, the teacher still had us copy it three times.)
因为我没有听清楚,所以老师又说了一遍。(Because I didn't hear clearly, the teacher said it once more.)
春天来了,公园里的花不但开得漂亮,而且遍地都是。(Spring has come; the flowers in the park are not only beautiful, but also blooming everywhere.)

p3-2.definition-english: A common Chinese surname; old; to arrange or display
p3-2.sentence: 图书馆里陈列着许多有趣的书籍。(The library displays many interesting books.)
complex: 因为博物馆里陈列了很多恐龙化石,所以每天都有很多小朋友来参观。(Because the museum displays many dinosaur fossils, many children come to visit every day.)
妹妹一边整理书桌,一边把陈旧的图画贴在墙上。(My younger sister tidied her desk while sticking old drawings on the wall.)
他不但陈述了事情的经过,而且说得很清楚。(He not only recounted what happened, but also explained it very clearly.)

p3-2.definition-english: A common Chinese surname; reckless; beard
p3-2.sentence: 妈妈把胡萝卜切成小块煮汤。(Mom cut the carrots into small pieces to make soup.)
complex: 虽然他只是胡说,但是妹妹却相信了。(Although he was just talking nonsense, my younger sister believed it.)
妈妈一边切胡萝卜,一边教我怎么煮汤。(Mom sliced carrots while teaching me how to cook soup.)
他不但胡乱回答问题,而且态度也很不认真。(He not only answered the questions carelessly, but also had a very careless attitude.)

p3-2.definition-english: A very common Chinese surname; also a plum tree or its fruit
p3-2.sentence: 我们班新来的同学姓李。(The new classmate in our class has the surname Li.)
complex: 虽然李子看起来很酸,但是吃起来很甜。(Although the plums look sour, they taste very sweet.)
因为院子里种了一棵李树,所以我们每年夏天都能吃到新鲜的李子。(Because a plum tree was planted in the yard, we can eat fresh plums every summer.)
李老师不但教得好,而且对学生很有耐心。(Teacher Li not only teaches well, but is also very patient with students.)

words: 吴国 (Wú guó, State of Wu)
p3-2.definition-english: A common Chinese surname; name of an ancient state
p3-2.sentence: 我的数学老师姓吴。(My math teacher's surname is Wu.)
complex: 虽然吴老师很严格,但是同学们都很喜欢她。(Although Teacher Wu is very strict, the students all like her.)
因为吴医生对病人很有耐心,所以大家都很信任他。(Because Dr. Wu is very patient with patients, everyone trusts him.)
吴爷爷一边喝茶,一边给我们讲吴国的故事。(Grandpa Wu drank tea while telling us stories about the State of Wu.)

words: 言行 (yán xíng, words and deeds)
p3-2.definition-english: Speech; word; to speak
p3-2.sentence: 他在班会上大胆发言。(He spoke up boldly at the class meeting.)
complex: 因为他准备得很充分,所以在班会上发言时特别自信。(Because he prepared thoroughly, he was especially confident when speaking up at the class meeting.)
他一边紧张地站起来,一边准备在班会上发言。(He nervously stood up while getting ready to speak at the class meeting.)
我们不但要注意言行,而且要对别人有礼貌。(We should not only pay attention to our words and deeds, but also be polite to others.)

words: 贵姓 (guì xìng, what is your surname?)
p3-2.definition-english: A family name or surname
p3-2.sentence: 请问你贵姓?(May I ask what your surname is?)
complex: 虽然老师还不认识新同学,但是已经记住了他的姓名。(Although the teacher doesn't know the new classmate yet, she has already remembered his full name.)
老师一边翻看名册,一边核对同学们的姓氏。(The teacher flipped through the register while checking the students' surnames.)
他不但记得我的姓名,而且还记得我的生日。(He not only remembers my name, but also remembers my birthday.)

p3-2.definition-english: A name; fame; famous
p3-2.sentence: 这家餐厅的炒饭很有名。(This restaurant's fried rice is very famous.)
complex: 虽然这家小店不大,但是它的点心很有名。(Although this small shop isn't big, its snacks are very famous.)
因为老师把名单贴在门口,所以大家都知道自己被分到哪一组。(Because the teacher posted the name list at the door, everyone knew which group they were assigned to.)
这位科学家不但名字很特别,而且非常有名。(This scientist not only has an unusual name, but is also very famous.)

p3-2.definition-english: Fat; chubby; overweight
p3-2.sentence: 弟弟因为吃太多零食而变胖了。(My younger brother has gotten fat from eating too many snacks.)
complex: 虽然他有点胖,但是跑起步来还是很快。(Although he's a bit chubby, he still runs very fast.)
因为他很少运动,所以身体渐渐变胖了。(Because he rarely exercises, his body has gradually gotten fat.)
那只胖乎乎的猫一边打哈欠,一边慢慢地走开。(That chubby cat yawned while slowly walking away.)

words: 瘦小 (shòu xiǎo, thin and small)
又瘦又高 (yòu shòu yòu gāo, tall and thin)
p3-2.definition-english: Thin; slim; lean
p3-2.sentence: 那只小猫又瘦又小,让人心疼。(That kitten is thin and small, which makes people feel sorry for it.)
complex: 因为哥哥最近生病了,所以他变得清瘦了许多。(Because my older brother has been sick recently, he has become much thinner.)
那个瘦小的男孩一边跑步,一边大声地为同学加油。(That thin, small boy ran while loudly cheering for his classmates.)
他不但又瘦又高,而且跑步速度很快。(He is not only tall and thin, but also runs very fast.)

words: 矮小 (ǎi xiǎo, short and small)
p3-2.definition-english: Short in height; low
p3-2.sentence: 弟弟比同龄的孩子矮一些。(My younger brother is a bit shorter than kids his age.)
complex: 虽然他长得比较矮,但是篮球打得很好。(Although he is relatively short, he plays basketball very well.)
老师一边测量身高,一边记录同学们的高矮。(The teacher measured height while recording the students' heights.)
这棵树不但矮小,而且长得很慢。(This tree is not only short and small, but also grows very slowly.)

p3-2.definition-english: Meaning; idea; intention; wish
p3-2.sentence: 老师提醒我们过马路要多加注意。(The teacher reminded us to pay extra attention when crossing the road.)
complex: 虽然这个句子的意思很简单,但是他还是抄错了。(Although the meaning of this sentence is simple, he still copied it wrongly.)
因为路上车很多,所以我们过马路时要特别注意。(Because there is a lot of traffic on the road, we need to pay special attention when crossing.)
他不但认真听讲,而且经常提出自己的意见。(He not only listens attentively, but also often offers his own opinions.)

p3-2.definition-english: To think; thought; longing
p3-2.sentence: 遇到难题时,我会静静地思考。(When I encounter a difficult problem, I quietly think it over.)
complex: 虽然这句话的意思很深,但是他还是努力听懂了。(Although the meaning of this sentence is profound, he still tried hard to understand it.)
因为爷爷住在乡下,所以妈妈常常思念他。(Because grandpa lives in the countryside, mom often misses him.)
他一边散步,一边思考数学题的答案。(He took a walk while thinking about the answer to the math question.)

words: 姑且 (gū qiě, for the time being)
p3-2.definition-english: Father's sister; aunt; young woman; temporarily
p3-2.sentence: 我的姑姑下个月要结婚了。(My aunt is getting married next month.)
complex: 因为姑姑要结婚了,所以全家人都很忙着准备。(Because my aunt is getting married, the whole family is busy preparing.)
姑姑一边包礼物,一边跟我们说她的婚礼计划。(My aunt wrapped gifts while telling us about her wedding plans.)
姑姑不但会做饭,而且做的菜特别好吃。(My aunt not only can cook, but also makes especially delicious dishes.)

p3-2.definition-english: To talk; to discuss; a conversation
p3-2.sentence: 放学后,我喜欢和朋友们坐在一起谈天。(After school, I like to sit and chat with my friends.)
complex: 虽然他们谈了很久,但是还没有谈出结果。(Although they talked for a long time, they still haven't reached a conclusion.)
我们一边吃点心,一边开心地谈天。(We ate snacks while happily chatting.)
校长不但喜欢和学生谈话,而且很会倾听我们的想法。(The principal not only likes to talk with students, but also listens well to our ideas.)

p3-2.definition-english: A topic; a question; a problem
p3-2.sentence: 这道数学题目有点难。(This math question is a bit difficult.)
complex: 虽然这道题目很难,但是他最后还是算出来了。(Although this question is difficult, he finally worked it out.)
因为试卷上的题目太多,所以他写得很慢。(Because there were too many questions on the exam paper, he wrote slowly.)
这份试题不但题目多,而且难度也很高。(This set of exam questions not only has many questions, but is also very difficult.)

p3-2.definition-english: To retreat; to withdraw; to return; to retire
p3-2.sentence: 因为不认真练习,他的成绩退步了。(Because he didn't practice seriously, his grades declined.)
complex: 虽然他这次考试退步了,但是他并没有灰心。(Although he did worse in this exam, he didn't lose heart.)
因为爷爷已经退休了,所以他每天都有时间去公园散步。(Because grandpa has already retired, he has time to walk in the park every day.)
他一边说抱歉,一边慢慢退出比赛。(He apologized while slowly withdrawing from the competition.)

words: 写信 (xiě xìn, write a letter)
p3-2.definition-english: To trust; to believe; a letter (correspondence)
p3-2.sentence: 我写信给远方的笔友。(I wrote a letter to my pen pal who lives far away.)
complex: 因为老师常常鼓励我们,所以我们做事更有信心。(Because the teacher often encourages us, we do things with more confidence.)
她一边听音乐,一边给外婆写信。(She listened to music while writing a letter to grandma.)
我们不但要相信自己,而且要努力做到最好。(We should not only believe in ourselves, but also try our best to do well.)

p3-2.definition-english: A pair; double; two of something
p3-2.sentence: 妈妈给我买了一双新鞋。(Mom bought me a pair of new shoes.)
complex: 虽然这双鞋有点旧了,但是他还是舍不得丢掉。(Although these shoes are a bit old, he still can't bear to throw them away.)
她一边用双手拍球,一边数着数字。(She dribbled the ball with both hands while counting numbers.)
这对双胞胎不但长得像,而且喜欢的东西也一样。(These twins not only look alike, but also like the same things.)

words: 听懂 (tīng dǒng, understand by listening)
看懂 (kàn dǒng, understand by reading)
p3-2.definition-english: To understand; to know; to comprehend
p3-2.sentence: 他耐心地讲解,直到我们都听懂为止。(He explained patiently until we all understood.)
complex: 虽然这篇文章很长,但是我全都看懂了。(Although this article is long, I understood all of it.)
因为老师讲解得很清楚,所以大家都听懂了。(Because the teacher explained very clearly, everyone understood.)
他不但懂得关心别人,而且经常帮助同学。(He not only knows how to care for others, but also often helps his classmates.)

p3-2.definition-english: Clever; intelligent; sharp-minded
p3-2.sentence: 这只小狗非常聪明,一学就会。(This puppy is very clever and learns quickly.)
complex: 虽然这只鹦鹉很聪明,但是有时候还是会说错话。(Although this parrot is very clever, sometimes it still says the wrong thing.)
因为她很聪明,所以很快就学会了游泳。(Because she is very clever, she quickly learned to swim.)
那只聪慧的小狗一边摇尾巴,一边看着主人。(That clever puppy wagged its tail while watching its owner.)

p3-2.definition-english: To roll up; an exam paper; a volume or scroll
p3-2.sentence: 考试铃声一响,大家都开始写试卷。(As soon as the exam bell rang, everyone started writing on their test papers.)
complex: 因为快要下雨了,所以爷爷赶紧把地上的席子卷起来。(Because it was about to rain, grandpa quickly rolled up the mat on the ground.)
同学们一边检查试卷,一边把答案填写清楚。(The classmates checked their exam papers while filling in the answers clearly.)
这份卷子不但题目多,而且时间很紧张。(This exam paper not only has many questions, but the time is also very tight.)

p3-2.definition-english: Because; reason; cause
p3-2.sentence: 因为下大雨,运动会取消了。(Because it rained heavily, the sports day was cancelled.)
complex: 虽然他不肯说出原因,但是大家都能猜到发生了什么事。(Although he refuses to say the reason, everyone can guess what happened.)
老师一边写字,一边解释考试失败的原因。(The teacher wrote while explaining the reasons for the exam failure.)
这件事不但原因复杂,而且影响很大。(This matter not only has complicated reasons, but also has a big impact.)

p3-2.definition-english: Language; speech; words
p3-2.sentence: 华语是我们的第二语言。(Mandarin is our second language.)
complex: 虽然华语对他来说有点难,但是他还是很努力地学习。(Although Mandarin is a bit difficult for him, he still studies it very hard.)
因为他每天都练习说华语,所以他的语言能力进步很快。(Because he practices speaking Mandarin every day, his language skills improve quickly.)
她不但语文成绩好,而且很喜欢阅读华语故事书。(She not only has good Chinese language grades, but also loves reading Chinese storybooks.)

p3-2.definition-english: Strange; odd; wonderful; curious
p3-2.sentence: 森林里传来一阵奇怪的声音。(A strange sound came from the forest.)
complex: 虽然这件事听起来很奇怪,但是它确实发生了。(Although this matter sounds strange, it really happened.)
因为他对昆虫很好奇,所以经常观察它们。(Because he is very curious about insects, he often observes them.)
妹妹一边翻看图画书,一边说故事真奇妙。(My younger sister flipped through the picture book while saying the story was truly wonderful.)

p3-2.definition-english: Strange; weird; to blame; a monster
p3-2.sentence: 弟弟说他做了一个关于怪物的梦。(My younger brother said he had a dream about a monster.)
complex: 因为弟弟不小心打破了花瓶,所以妈妈责怪了他几句。(Because my younger brother accidentally broke the vase, mom scolded him a little.)
弟弟一边画画,一边讲他梦里的怪物。(My younger brother drew while talking about the monster in his dream.)
这个故事不但很奇怪,而且结局让人意外。(This story is not only strange, but also has a surprising ending.)

p3-2.definition-english: To decide; to fix; stable; certainly
p3-2.sentence: 我们决定星期天去动物园玩。(We decided to go to the zoo on Sunday.)
complex: 虽然这件事很难,但是他一定要完成。(Although this matter is difficult, he is determined to finish it.)
妈妈一边看菜单,一边跟我们商量决定吃什么。(Mom looked at the menu while discussing with us to decide what to eat.)
我们不但定好了出发的时间,而且还准备好了所有东西。(We not only fixed the departure time, but also got everything ready.)

p3-2.definition-english: Real; true; genuine; really
p3-2.sentence: 他做事一向很认真。(He has always been serious about his work.)
complex: 虽然魔术表演看起来是真的,但是其实是假的。(Although the magic show looks real, it is actually fake.)
因为他做作业一向很认真,所以成绩一直很好。(Because he has always been diligent with his homework, his grades have always been good.)
他不但认真学习,而且真正理解了课文的内容。(He not only studies seriously, but also truly understands the content of the text.)

p3-3.definition-english: To accompany; to keep someone company
p3-3.sentence: 周末,爸爸会陪伴我们去公园散步。(On weekends, Dad accompanies us for a walk in the park.)
complex: 因为妈妈今天很忙,所以爸爸陪我去看医生。(Because Mom is very busy today, Dad accompanied me to see the doctor.)
奶奶一边陪着我做功课,一边织毛衣。(Grandma keeps me company doing homework while knitting a sweater.)
姐姐不但陪我练习钢琴,而且教我唱歌。(My sister not only accompanies me practicing piano, but also teaches me to sing.)

p3-3.definition-english: To dress up; to install; to pretend; to load
p3-3.sentence: 弟弟喜欢装扮成超人的样子。(My younger brother likes to dress up as Superman.)
complex: 虽然弟弟很累,但是他还是假装很有精神。(Although my younger brother is very tired, he still pretends to be full of energy.)
妹妹一边装扮成公主,一边照镜子。(My little sister dresses up as a princess while looking in the mirror.)
工人们不但很认真,而且很快就装好了新灯。(The workers are not only careful, but also quickly installed the new light.)

words: 一辆车 (yī liàng chē, one vehicle)
两辆自行车 (liǎng liàng zì xíng chē, two bicycles)
p3-3.definition-english: Measure word for vehicles
p3-3.sentence: 爸爸新买了一辆汽车。(Dad just bought a new car.)
complex: 虽然这辆车很旧,但是它跑得还是很快。(Although this car is old, it still runs very fast.)
因为我们家有五个人,所以爸爸买了一辆七人车。(Because there are five people in our family, Dad bought a seven-seater car.)
这辆车不但很漂亮,而且开得很快。(This car is not only beautiful, but also drives very fast.)

p3-3.definition-english: Single; alone; simple; a list or form
p3-3.sentence: 妈妈换了一条干净的床单。(Mom changed to a clean bedsheet.)
complex: 虽然这些单词很难,但是我还是努力背了下来。(Although these vocabulary words are difficult, I still worked hard to memorize them.)
因为床单脏了,所以妈妈把它换了下来。(Because the bed sheet was dirty, Mom changed it.)
服务员一边给我们菜单,一边微笑着打招呼。(The waiter gave us the menu while smiling and greeting us.)

p3-3.definition-english: To exceed; to surpass; super-
p3-3.sentence: 我们放学后去超市买水果。(We went to the supermarket after school to buy fruit.)
complex: 因为家里没有牛奶了,所以妈妈去超市买了一些。(Because there was no milk at home, Mom went to the supermarket to buy some.)
爸爸一边推着购物车,一边在超市里找东西。(Dad pushed the shopping cart while looking for things in the supermarket.)
这个运动员不但跑得快,而且成绩超过了很多同学。(This athlete not only runs fast, but his results also exceed many classmates'.)

words: 按键 (àn jiàn, press a key)
p3-3.definition-english: To press; to push; according to
p3-3.sentence: 我们要按时完成作业。(We must complete our homework on time.)
complex: 虽然按键很小,但是我还是按对了。(Although the button is very small, I still pressed the right one.)
妹妹一边按着遥控器,一边看电视。(My little sister presses the remote control while watching TV.)
我们不但按时到达,而且还提前了五分钟。(We not only arrived on time, but also five minutes early.)

p3-3.definition-english: A lid or cover; to cover; to build
p3-3.sentence: 请把水壶的盖子盖好。(Please close the lid of the kettle properly.)
complex: 虽然瓶子的盖子很紧,但是哥哥还是把它打开了。(Although the bottle's lid is very tight, my brother still managed to open it.)
因为外面在下雪,所以雪花覆盖了整个花园。(Because it was snowing outside, snow covered the whole garden.)
这个盖子不但好看,而且盖得很紧。(This lid is not only nice-looking, but also covers very tightly.)

p3-3.definition-english: To inhale; to absorb; to attract
p3-3.sentence: 深呼吸可以帮助我们放松。(Deep breathing can help us relax.)
complex: 虽然天气很热,但是公园里的风景还是很吸引人。(Although the weather is very hot, the park's scenery is still very attractive.)
因为运动后很渴,所以妹妹用吸管喝了很多水。(Because she was very thirsty after exercising, my little sister drank a lot of water with a straw.)
我们一边散步,一边深深地呼吸新鲜空气。(We took a walk while breathing in the fresh air deeply.)

p3-3.definition-english: A tube or pipe; to manage; to be in charge of
p3-3.sentence: 妹妹用吸管喝果汁。(My little sister drinks juice with a straw.)
complex: 因为妹妹年纪小,所以她还不会管理自己的时间。(Because my little sister is young, she still doesn't know how to manage her own time.)
弟弟一边用吸管喝奶茶,一边看漫画书。(My younger brother drinks bubble tea with a straw while reading comic books.)
班长不但很会管理班级,而且对同学很好。(The class monitor is not only good at managing the class, but also kind to classmates.)

words: 弹钢琴 (tán gāng qín, play piano)
p3-3.definition-english: To play a stringed instrument; to bounce; a bullet
p3-3.sentence: 姐姐每天放学后弹钢琴。(My sister plays the piano every day after school.)
complex: 虽然弹钢琴很难,但是姐姐每天都坚持练习。(Although playing the piano is difficult, my sister still practices every day.)
哥哥一边弹钢琴,一边轻轻地唱歌。(My brother plays the piano while singing softly.)
这只青蛙不但会游泳,而且弹跳能力很强。(This frog not only can swim, but also has strong jumping ability.)

p3-3.definition-english: A clock or bell; measure word for minutes
p3-3.sentence: 我每天早上七点被闹钟叫醒。(I am woken up by an alarm clock at seven every morning.)
complex: 虽然闹钟响了,但是弟弟还是不想起床。(Although the alarm clock rang, my younger brother still didn't want to get up.)
因为闹钟坏了,所以我今天早上起晚了。(Because the alarm clock was broken, I got up late this morning.)
这个钟表不但样子好看,而且走得很准。(This clock is not only nice-looking, but also keeps accurate time.)

p3-3.english: back (of body); memorize; carry on back
p3-3.definition-english: The back of the body; to memorize; to carry on one's back
p3-3.sentence: 上学的时候,我总是背着书包。(When going to school, I always carry my backpack.)
complex: 虽然要背的课文很长,但是我还是把它背熟了。(Although the text to memorize is long, I still memorized it thoroughly.)
因为明天要考试,所以他昨晚认真地背书到很晚。(Because there's an exam tomorrow, he seriously recited his lessons late into last night.)
妹妹一边背着书包,一边跟同学说笑。(My little sister carries her backpack while chatting and laughing with classmates.)

p3-3.definition-english: Powder; pink color; flour
p3-3.sentence: 妹妹的房间是粉红色的。(My little sister's room is pink.)
complex: 因为妹妹最喜欢粉红色,所以妈妈给她买了粉红色的裙子。(Because my little sister loves pink the most, Mom bought her a pink dress.)
奶奶一边搅拌面粉,一边准备做蛋糕。(Grandma stirs the flour while preparing to make a cake.)
这种药不但是白色粉末,而且没有什么味道。(This medicine is not only white powder, but also has almost no taste.)

p3-3.definition-english: Shape; form; state; condition
p3-3.sentence: 这块饼干的形状像一颗星星。(This biscuit is shaped like a star.)
complex: 虽然这块蛋糕的形状不太整齐,但是味道还是很好。(Although the shape of this cake is not very neat, it still tastes good.)
医生一边检查症状,一边询问弟弟的情况。(The doctor examines the symptoms while asking about my younger brother's condition.)
今天哥哥不但精神状态很好,而且做事也特别有效率。(Today my brother is not only in a great state of mind, but also does things very efficiently.)

p3-3.definition-english: Accurate; standard; to allow; to prepare
p3-3.sentence: 我们已经准备好参加比赛了。(We are already prepared to take part in the competition.)
complex: 虽然时间很紧,但是我们还是准备好了。(Although time was tight, we still got ready.)
因为答案很准确,所以老师表扬了他。(Because the answer was very accurate, the teacher praised him.)
这位运动员不但动作标准,而且速度也很快。(This athlete not only has standard form, but also is very fast.)

p3-3.definition-english: To change; to correct; to revise
p3-3.sentence: 老师帮我改正了作文里的错字。(The teacher helped me correct the wrong characters in my essay.)
complex: 虽然这个坏习惯很难改,但是他还是慢慢改正了。(Although this bad habit is hard to change, he still slowly corrected it.)
因为作文里有很多错字,所以老师帮我修改了几次。(Because there were many wrong characters in my essay, the teacher helped me revise it several times.)
他一边修改作文,一边跟老师讨论。(He revises his essay while discussing it with the teacher.)

words: 迟早 (chí zǎo, sooner or later)
p3-3.definition-english: Late; slow; tardy
p3-3.sentence: 他因为睡过头而迟到了。(He was late because he overslept.)
complex: 因为公交车迟到了,所以我们也跟着迟到了。(Because the bus was late, we were late too.)
他一边跑步,一边担心自己会迟到。(He runs while worrying that he will be late.)
校车不但迟到了,而且司机看起来也很着急。(The school bus was not only late, but the driver also looked anxious.)

p3-3.definition-english: A habit; to be accustomed to
p3-3.sentence: 早睡早起是一个好习惯。(Sleeping early and waking up early is a good habit.)
complex: 虽然改掉坏习惯不容易,但是弟弟还是做到了。(Although it's not easy to change a bad habit, my younger brother still managed to do it.)
爷爷习惯每天早起,他一边散步,一边呼吸新鲜空气。(Grandpa is used to getting up early every day; he takes a walk while breathing fresh air.)
这个班不但习惯了新老师,而且成绩也越来越好。(This class is not only used to the new teacher, but also its results are getting better and better.)

p3-3.definition-english: Blue; the color blue
p3-3.sentence: 今天的天空是清澈的蓝色。(Today's sky is a clear blue color.)
complex: 虽然早上有点阴,但是到了中午天空就变蓝了。(Although it was a bit cloudy in the morning, the sky turned blue by noon.)
因为今天没有云,所以蓝天看起来特别美。(Because there are no clouds today, the blue sky looks especially beautiful.)
这条裙子不但是蓝色的,而且上面还有白色的花。(This dress is not only blue, but also has white flowers on it.)

words: 床上 (chuáng shàng, on the bed)
p3-3.definition-english: A bed; measure word for beds and quilts
p3-3.sentence: 每天早上我都要按时起床。(Every morning I have to get up on time.)
complex: 虽然弟弟很想睡懒觉,但是他还是按时起床了。(Although my younger brother wanted to sleep in, he still got up on time.)
因为昨晚睡得晚,所以我今天很晚才起床。(Because I slept late last night, I only got up very late today.)
妹妹一边坐在床上,一边整理她的床铺。(My little sister sits on the bed while tidying her bedding.)

p3-3.definition-english: A partner; a group; gang
p3-3.sentence: 小狗是我最好的伙伴。(The puppy is my best companion.)
complex: 因为小狗很聪明,所以它成了我最好的伙伴。(Because the puppy is very smart, it became my best companion.)
我们一边玩游戏,一边和小伙伴聊天。(We play games while chatting with our little friends.)
这些小伙伴不但爱运动,而且成绩也很好。(These little friends not only love sports, but also have good grades.)

p3-3.definition-english: A companion; a partner; to accompany
p3-3.sentence: 家人的陪伴让我感到很温暖。(My family's company makes me feel very warm.)
complex: 虽然爸爸工作很忙,但是他还是常常陪伴我们。(Although Dad is very busy with work, he still often accompanies us.)
奶奶一边陪伴着我,一边讲有趣的故事。(Grandma keeps me company while telling interesting stories.)
这只小狗不但是我的伙伴,而且也是我最好的朋友。(This puppy is not only my companion, but also my best friend.)

p3-3.definition-english: To show; to express; a form; a watch; surface
p3-3.sentence: 爷爷送给我一只手表当生日礼物。(Grandpa gave me a wristwatch as a birthday present.)
complex: 虽然这只手表很旧,但是爷爷还是每天戴着它。(Although this watch is old, Grandpa still wears it every day.)
因为要准时到达,所以他特地戴上了手表。(Because he needed to arrive on time, he specially put on his watch.)
这张表格不但简单,而且很容易填写。(This form is not only simple, but also very easy to fill in.)

p3-3.definition-english: Color; face; appearance
p3-3.sentence: 妹妹用颜料画了一幅美丽的画。(My little sister painted a beautiful picture with paint.)
complex: 虽然这幅画的颜色很简单,但是看起来还是很漂亮。(Although the colors of this painting are simple, it still looks very beautiful.)
因为妹妹喜欢画画,所以妈妈给她买了很多颜料。(Because my little sister loves drawing, Mom bought her a lot of paint.)
弟弟一边挑选颜色,一边给图画上色。(My younger brother picks colors while coloring the picture.)

p3-3.definition-english: Sound; noise; loud; to make a sound
p3-3.sentence: 窗外突然传来一声巨响。(A loud noise suddenly came from outside the window.)
complex: 因为外面雷声很响,所以妹妹被吓哭了。(Because the thunder outside was very loud, my little sister was scared to tears.)
弟弟一边听音乐,一边把声音开得很响。(My younger brother listens to music while turning up the volume loudly.)
打雷的声音不但很响,而且持续了很久。(The sound of thunder was not only loud, but also lasted a long time.)

p3-3.definition-english: To sleep; to go to sleep
p3-3.sentence: 弟弟每天中午都要午睡一会儿。(My younger brother takes a nap every afternoon.)
complex: 虽然弟弟很困,但是他还是睡不着。(Although my younger brother is very sleepy, he still can't fall asleep.)

妹妹一边写电话号码一边念给我听。(My younger sister writes down the phone number while reading it out to me.)
老师不但号召大家做运动,而且自己也每天跑步。(The teacher not only calls on everyone to exercise, but also runs every day herself.)

p3-5.sentence: 刚才下的雨刚好把花园浇湿了。(The rain that just fell happened to water the garden well.)
complex: 虽然雨刚刚停,但是地上还是湿的。(Although the rain has just stopped, the ground is still wet.)
我们一边等车一边聊刚才发生的事。(We wait for the bus while chatting about what just happened.)
这个时间不但刚好,而且交通也不塞。(This timing is not only just right, but also the traffic isn't jammed.)

words: 付出 (fù chū, give/put in effort)
p3-5.sentence: 妈妈在收银台付钱买菜。(Mom paid for the groceries at the checkout counter.)
complex: 虽然这件衣服有点贵,但是爸爸还是付钱买了下来。(Although this piece of clothing was a bit expensive, Dad still paid for it.)
因为我忘了带钱包,所以朋友帮我付钱。(Because I forgot to bring my wallet, my friend paid for me.)
他不但用手机支付,而且从不忘记带现金。(He not only pays with his phone, but also never forgets to bring cash.)

p3-5.definition-english: Money; coin; a unit of weight
p3-5.sentence: 他把零钱放进钱包里。(He put the loose change into his wallet.)
complex: 虽然他的钱包里钱不多,但是他还是捐了一些给慈善机构。(Although there wasn't much money in his wallet, he still donated some to charity.)
因为他把零钱都存起来,所以钱包里渐渐多了很多硬币。(Because he saved all his loose change, his wallet gradually had more and more coins.)
妈妈一边数钱一边把它们放进钱包。(Mom counts the money while putting it into her wallet.)

words: 一束花 (yī shù huā, a bouquet)
p3-5.definition-english: A bundle; to tie; to restrain; to end
p3-5.sentence: 老师收到了一束美丽的鲜花。(The teacher received a beautiful bouquet of flowers.)
complex: 因为比赛已经结束,所以大家都开心地回家了。(Because the competition had ended, everyone happily went home.)
弟弟一边走路一边抱着一束花。(My younger brother walks while holding a bouquet of flowers.)
这束花不但美丽,而且香气扑鼻。(This bouquet is not only beautiful, but also has a fragrant scent.)

p3-5.definition-english: Fresh; bright in color; rare; delicious
p3-5.sentence: 市场里卖着许多新鲜的蔬菜。(The market sells many fresh vegetables.)
complex: 虽然市场里的鲜花很贵,但是妈妈还是买了一些。(Although the fresh flowers at the market were expensive, Mom still bought some.)
爷爷一边浇水一边照顾新鲜的蔬菜。(Grandpa waters the plants while taking care of the fresh vegetables.)
这些水果不但新鲜,而且颜色很鲜艳。(These fruits are not only fresh, but also very brightly colored.)

words: 提问 (tí wèn, ask a question)
p3-5.definition-english: To carry; to raise; to mention; to propose
p3-5.sentence: 上课时,老师鼓励我们主动提问。(During class, the teacher encourages us to actively ask questions.)
complex: 虽然这个问题很难,但是他还是勇敢地提问了。(Although this question was difficult, he still bravely asked it.)
因为他每天都练习阅读,所以他的成绩提高了很多。(Because he practices reading every day, his grades have improved a lot.)
老师不但鼓励我们提问,而且耐心地为我们解答。(The teacher not only encourages us to ask questions, but also patiently answers them for us.)

p3-5.sentence: 图书馆里有很多电脑设备。(The library has a lot of computer equipment.)
complex: 虽然明天有考试,但是他已经准备好了。(Although there is an exam tomorrow, he has already prepared well.)
因为图书馆的设备很齐全,所以我们喜欢在那里做功课。(Because the library's equipment is complete, we like to do our homework there.)
妈妈一边准备晚餐一边听广播。(Mom prepares dinner while listening to the radio.)

words: 饮食 (yǐn shí, diet/food and drink)
p3-5.sentence: 我们中午在食堂吃午饭。(We eat lunch in the canteen at noon.)
complex: 因为食堂的食物很好吃,所以同学们都喜欢在那里吃饭。(Because the food at the canteen is delicious, the students all like to eat there.)
弟弟一边在食堂吃饭一边和朋友聊天。(My younger brother eats in the canteen while chatting with friends.)
健康的饮食不但重要,而且能让我们更有精神。(A healthy diet is not only important, but also gives us more energy.)

p3-5.sentence: 这场篮球比赛真精彩!(This basketball match was really exciting!)
complex: 虽然天空还下着雨,但是我们看到了美丽的彩虹。(Although it was still raining, we saw a beautiful rainbow.)
妹妹一边看电视一边用彩色铅笔画画。(My younger sister watches TV while drawing with colored pencils.)
这场表演不但精彩,而且充满了欢笑。(This performance is not only wonderful, but also full of laughter.)

words: 脚底 (jiǎo dǐ, sole of foot)
p3-5.definition-english: A foot; the base of something
p3-5.sentence: 他走路的脚步声很轻。(His footsteps are very light when he walks.)
complex: 虽然他的脚受伤了,但是他还是坚持走完全程。(Although his foot was injured, he still insisted on finishing the whole distance.)
因为沙滩很干净,所以我们喜欢赤脚走在上面。(Because the beach is clean, we like to walk barefoot on it.)
他走路的脚步不但轻,而且很快。(His footsteps are not only light, but also very fast.)

words: 或多或少 (huò duō huò shǎo, more or less)
p3-5.sentence: 你可以选择果汁或者牛奶。(You can choose either juice or milk.)
complex: 虽然他说或许会来,但是最后还是没有出现。(Although he said he might come, in the end he still didn't show up.)
因为妈妈还没决定,所以我们或许明天才出发。(Because Mom hasn't decided yet, so we might set off tomorrow.)
我们一边看菜单一边讨论要点果汁或者牛奶。(We look at the menu while discussing whether to order juice or milk.)

p3-5.definition-english: One who; the person or thing that; a suffix meaning "-er"
p3-5.sentence: 这本书的作者是新加坡人。(The author of this book is Singaporean.)
complex: 因为这本书很受欢迎,所以作者又写了续集。(Because this book is very popular, the author wrote a sequel.)
读者们一边看书一边做笔记。(The readers take notes while reading the book.)
这位作者不但会写故事,而且很会画画。(This author is not only good at writing stories, but also good at drawing.)

p3-5.sentence: 今天是妈妈的生日,这是个特别的日子。(Today is Mom's birthday, a special day.)
complex: 虽然今天是普通的一天,但是妈妈还是准备了特别的晚餐。(Although today is an ordinary day, Mom still prepared a special dinner.)
老师一边讲课一边介绍这个国家的特点。(The teacher lectures while introducing this country's characteristics.)
这道菜不但特别,而且非常好吃。(This dish is not only special, but also very delicious.)

p3-5.sentence: 我们不应该随便拿别人的东西。(We should not casually take other people's things.)
complex: 虽然很舍不得,但是我们还是向朋友告别了。(Although we were reluctant, we still said goodbye to our friend.)
因为妈妈教我们要尊重别人,所以我们从不随便取笑同学。(Because Mom taught us to respect others, we never casually make fun of our classmates.)
这份礼物不但特别,而且充满了心意。(This gift is not only special, but also full of thoughtfulness.)

words: 依附 (yī fù, depend on/attach to)
p3-5.definition-english: To attach; nearby; to depend on
p3-5.sentence: 我家附近有一座公园。(There is a park near my house.)
complex: 虽然天色已晚,但是附近的公园里还有很多人在散步。(Although it was already getting dark, there were still many people walking in the nearby park.)
因为学校附近新开了一家书店,所以我们放学后常去看看。(Because a new bookstore opened near the school, we often go there after school.)
哥哥一边写生日卡一边把照片附上。(My older brother writes the birthday card while attaching a photo to it.)

p3-5.sentence: 学校最近举办了一场绘画比赛。(The school recently held a drawing competition.)
complex: 因为最近天气很热,所以我们常常去游泳。(Because the weather has been hot recently, we often go swimming.)
爷爷一边散步一边说起近来发生的趣事。(Grandpa walks while talking about interesting things that happened recently.)
附近的图书馆不但安静,而且书本很多。(The nearby library is not only quiet, but also has a lot of books.)

p3-5.sentence: 姐妹俩的感情非常好。(The two sisters have a very close relationship.)
complex: 虽然他们常常吵架,但是姐妹俩的感情还是很好。(Although they often quarrel, the two sisters' relationship is still very good.)
老师一边了解情况一边安慰哭泣的同学。(The teacher finds out the situation while comforting the crying student.)
这位售货员不但热情,而且很有耐心。(This salesperson is not only enthusiastic, but also very patient.)

p3-5.definition-english: Accurate; standard; to allow; to prepare
p3-5.sentence: 我们的字写得还没达到标准。(Our handwriting hasn't reached the standard yet.)
complex: 虽然时间很紧,但是我们还是准备好了所有的东西。(Although time was tight, we still got everything ready.)
因为他每天都认真练字,所以字写得越来越准确。(Because he practices writing carefully every day, his handwriting has become more and more accurate.)
他的答案不但准确,而且写得很整齐。(His answer is not only accurate, but also written very neatly.)

p3-6.definition-english: Soft; weak; flexible
p3-6.sentence: 这张床垫又软又舒服。(This mattress is soft and comfortable.)
complex: 因为这个枕头很软,所以妹妹很喜欢抱着它睡觉。(Because this pillow is very soft, younger sister likes to hug it while sleeping.)
弟弟一边打游戏一边夸奖这个软件很好用。(While playing the game, younger brother praised how good this software was at the same time.)
这只小狗的毛不但很软而且很干净。(This puppy's fur is not only soft but also very clean.)

p3-6.definition-english: Hard; stiff; firm; hardware
p3-6.sentence: 石头摸起来又冷又硬。(The stone feels cold and hard.)
complex: 虽然这块饼干很硬,但是爷爷还是喜欢吃。(Although this biscuit is very hard, grandpa still likes to eat it.)
叔叔一边修理电脑一边检查硬件。(While repairing the computer, uncle checked the hardware at the same time.)
这张桌子不但很硬而且很重。(This table is not only hard but also very heavy.)

p3-6.definition-english: Loose; relaxed; a pine tree
p3-6.sentence: 考试结束后,大家都松了一口气。(After the exam ended, everyone breathed a sigh of relief.)
complex: 虽然功课很多,但是做完后我感到很轻松。(Although there was a lot of homework, I felt very relaxed after finishing it.)
因为绳子松开了,所以气球飞走了。(Because the rope loosened, the balloon flew away.)
公园里不但有松树而且有美丽的花朵。(The park not only has pine trees but also has beautiful flowers.)

p3-6.definition-english: Tight; urgent; close; nervous
p3-6.sentence: 考试前,我感到有点紧张。(Before the exam, I felt a little nervous.)
complex: 虽然比赛快开始了,但是我一点都不紧张。(Although the competition is about to start, I am not nervous at all.)
因为时间很紧急,所以我们赶紧出发了。(Because time was urgent, we set off quickly.)
同学们一边收拾书包一边抓紧时间复习功课。(While packing their bags, the classmates hurried to review their lessons at the same time.)

p3-6.definition-english: To lose; to miss; to fail
p3-6.sentence: 弟弟因为输了比赛而感到失望。(My younger brother felt disappointed because he lost the competition.)
complex: 因为他没有努力练习,所以比赛失败了。(Because he did not practice hard, he failed the competition.)
妹妹一边哭一边说她很失望。(While crying, younger sister said she was very disappointed at the same time.)
这次失败不但让他难过而且让他更加努力。(This failure not only made him sad but also made him work even harder.)

words: 不错 (bù cuò, not bad/pretty good)
犯错 (fàn cuò, make a mistake)
p3-6.definition-english: Wrong; a mistake; error; not bad
p3-6.sentence: 他今天的表现真不错。(His performance today was really good.)
complex: 虽然他犯了错,但是老师原谅了他。(Although he made a mistake, the teacher forgave him.)
老师一边改作业一边圈出错误的地方。(While marking the homework, the teacher circled the mistakes at the same time.)
这篇作文不但没有错误而且写得很不错。(This essay not only has no mistakes but also is very well written.)

p3-6.definition-english: A mistake; error; to miss; to delay
p3-6.sentence: 我们因为一场误会而吵架了。(We quarreled because of a misunderstanding.)
complex: 虽然是一场误会,但是他们很快就和好了。(Although it was a misunderstanding, they made up quickly.)
因为飞机延误了,所以我们在机场等了很久。(Because the flight was delayed, we waited at the airport for a long time.)
这个错误不但耽误了时间而且造成了误会。(This mistake not only wasted time but also caused a misunderstanding.)

words: 扔球 (rēng qiú, throw a ball)
p3-6.definition-english: To throw; to toss; to discard
p3-6.sentence: 请不要把垃圾乱扔在地上。(Please do not litter rubbish on the ground.)
complex: 虽然玩具坏了,但是弟弟不舍得把它扔掉。(Although the toy was broken, younger brother was reluctant to throw it away.)
因为垃圾桶满了,所以他把垃圾扔在了地上。(Because the rubbish bin was full, he threw the rubbish on the ground.)
他们一边说笑一边在草地上扔球。(While chatting and laughing, they threw the ball on the grass at the same time.)

p3-6.definition-english: To forgive; to understand; to excuse
p3-6.sentence: 他向朋友道歉,希望得到原谅。(He apologized to his friend, hoping to be forgiven.)
complex: 因为他诚心道歉,所以妈妈原谅了他。(Because he apologized sincerely, mom forgave him.)
老师一边点头一边说她谅解我们的错误。(While nodding, the teacher said she forgave our mistake at the same time.)
妈妈不但原谅了我而且鼓励我下次做得更好。(Mom not only forgave me but also encouraged me to do better next time.)

p3-6.definition-english: System; to tie; to connect; a department
p3-6.sentence: 我和邻居的关系一直很好。(My relationship with my neighbors has always been good.)
complex: 虽然我们很少见面,但是我们的关系一直很好。(Although we rarely meet, our relationship has always been good.)
哥哥一边修电脑一边研究新的系统。(While repairing the computer, older brother researched the new system at the same time.)
这个系统不但方便而且能帮助老师联系家长。(This system is not only convenient but also can help teachers contact parents.)

p3-6.definition-english: Sudden; to protrude; to break through
p3-6.sentence: 天空突然下起了大雨。(The sky suddenly poured with heavy rain.)
complex: 虽然天气突然变冷,但是同学们还是去了户外活动。(Although the weather suddenly turned cold, the students still went for the outdoor activity.)
因为他每天努力练习,所以成绩突破了自己的记录。(Because he practiced hard every day, his results broke through his own record.)
她在比赛中不但表现突出而且赢得了冠军。(In the competition, she not only performed outstandingly but also won the championship.)

words: 以及 (yǐ jí, as well as/and)
来不及 (lái bu jí, not enough time)
p3-6.definition-english: And; to reach; timely
p3-6.sentence: 消防员及时赶到,扑灭了大火。(The firefighters arrived in time and put out the fire.)
complex: 虽然他跑得很快,但是还是来不及赶上巴士。(Although he ran very fast, he still could not catch the bus in time.)
因为医生及时治疗,所以病人很快就好了。(Because the doctor treated him promptly, the patient recovered quickly.)
他一边整理书包一边检查功课有没有及时完成。(While tidying his bag, he checked whether his homework was completed on time at the same time.)

p3-6.definition-english: Reason; to manage; to tidy; to understand
p3-6.sentence: 妈妈说的话很有道理。(What Mom said makes a lot of sense.)
complex: 因为妈妈的话很有道理,所以我决定听她的建议。(Because mom's words made a lot of sense, I decided to follow her advice.)
爸爸一边喝咖啡一边管理店里的账目。(While drinking coffee, dad managed the shop's accounts at the same time.)
这位老师不但很会管理班级而且很理解学生。(This teacher not only manages the class well but also understands the students well.)

p3-6.definition-english: To compete; a match or race; a competition
p3-6.sentence: 我们班在运动会上赢得了赛跑比赛。(Our class won the running race at the sports day.)
complex: 虽然这场比赛很难,但是我们班还是赢了。(Although this competition was difficult, our class still won.)
他们一边练习跑步一边讨论比赛的策略。(While practicing running, they discussed the competition's strategy at the same time.)
这次比赛不但精彩而且很公平。(This competition was not only exciting but also very fair.)

words: 下跌 (xià diē, fall/drop in value)
p3-6.definition-english: To fall; to drop; to stumble
p3-6.sentence: 小妹妹跑得太快,不小心跌倒了。(My little sister ran too fast and accidentally fell down.)
complex: 虽然他跌倒了,但是他很快就站了起来。(Although he fell down, he quickly stood up again.)
因为地上很滑,所以妹妹不小心跌了一跤。(Because the ground was slippery, younger sister accidentally stumbled and fell.)
他跌倒时不但擦伤了膝盖而且弄脏了衣服。(When he fell down, he not only scraped his knee but also dirtied his clothes.)

words: 受到 (shòu dào, receive/be subjected to)
p3-6.definition-english: To receive; to accept; to suffer
p3-6.sentence: 他在踢球时不小心受伤了。(He accidentally got injured while playing football.)
complex: 虽然他受伤了,但是他还是完成了比赛。(Although he was injured, he still finished the competition.)
因为他努力学习,所以受到了老师的表扬。(Because he studied hard, he was praised by the teacher.)
护士一边照顾病人一边接受医生的指示。(While taking care of the patient, the nurse followed the doctor's instructions at the same time.)

p3-6.definition-english: To carve; a quarter hour; a moment; profound
p3-6.sentence: 听到铃声,同学们立刻排好队。(Upon hearing the bell, the students immediately lined up.)
complex: 因为老师叫他的名字,所以他立刻站了起来。(Because the teacher called his name, he stood up immediately.)
同学们一边听故事一边思考其中深刻的道理。(While listening to the story, the classmates thought about the profound lesson within it at the same time.)
这件事不但让他印象深刻而且让他学会了道理。(This incident not only left a deep impression on him but also taught him a lesson.)

p3-6.definition-english: To push; to promote; to deduce
p3-6.sentence: 他用力推开了那扇沉重的门。(He pushed open that heavy door with force.)
complex: 虽然门很重,但是他还是用力推开了。(Although the door was heavy, he still pushed it open with force.)
他一边走路一边推着婴儿车。(While walking, he pushed the baby stroller at the same time.)
老师不但推荐了这本书而且鼓励我们多阅读。(The teacher not only recommended this book but also encouraged us to read more.)

p3-6.definition-english: To bump into; to collide; to ram
p3-6.sentence: 两辆自行车在转角处相撞了。(Two bicycles collided at the corner.)
complex: 虽然他小心开车,但是还是不小心撞上了栏杆。(Although he drove carefully, he still accidentally bumped into the railing.)
因为司机没有看清楚,所以两辆车撞在了一起。(Because the driver did not see clearly, the two cars collided.)
这次撞车不但吓坏了乘客而且弄坏了车子。(This car crash not only scared the passengers but also damaged the car.)

words: 原来 (yuán lái, originally/it turns out)
p3-6.definition-english: Original; source; a plain; to forgive
p3-6.sentence: 原来他是因为生病才请假的。(It turns out he took leave because he was sick.)
complex: 虽然原因很简单,但是他还是解释了很久。(Although the reason was simple, he still explained it for a long time.)
因为他说出了真正的原因,所以妈妈原谅了他。(Because he told the real reason, mom forgave him.)
他一边讲述事情的原因一边道歉。(While explaining the reason for what happened, he apologized at the same time.)

p3-6.definition-english: To play with; to do; to make; to handle
p3-6.sentence: 他不小心弄坏了妹妹的玩具。(He accidentally broke his little sister's toy.)
complex: 因为弟弟不小心弄坏了玩具,所以他很难过。(Because younger brother accidentally broke the toy, he felt very sad.)
他一边摆弄手中的拼图一边弄清楚正确的方法。(While fiddling with the puzzle in his hand, he figured out the correct way at the same time.)
这件事不但弄清楚了真相而且让大家更加了解彼此。(This matter not only clarified the truth but also helped everyone understand each other better.)

p3-6.definition-english: To break; broken; worn out; to damage
p3-6.sentence: 台风破坏了花园里的树木。(The typhoon damaged the trees in the garden.)
complex: 虽然这件衣服很破旧,但是他还是舍不得丢掉。(Although this piece of clothing is worn out, he is still reluctant to throw it away.)
工人们一边修补房子一边清理破旧的家具。(While repairing the house, the workers cleared out the worn-out furniture at the same time.)
台风不但破坏了花园而且吹倒了大树。(The typhoon not only damaged the garden but also blew down big trees.)

p3-6.definition-english: To resemble; an image; like; as if
p3-6.sentence: 天上的云好像一只绵羊。(The cloud in the sky looks like a sheep.)
complex: 虽然天气好像快要下雨了,但是我们还是决定出门。(Although it looked like it was going to rain, we still decided to go out.)
因为电视的图像很模糊,所以爸爸拿去修理了。(Because the TV's image was blurry, dad took it to be repaired.)
他画的画不但像样而且很有创意。(The picture he drew is not only decent but also very creative.)

p3-6.definition-english: To fall over; to pour; reverse; on the contrary
p3-6.sentence: 爷爷小心地为客人倒水。(Grandpa carefully poured water for the guests.)
complex: 虽然风很大,但是那棵树没有倒下。(Although the wind was strong, that tree did not fall over.)
因为杯子太满了,所以水倒了出来。(Because the cup was too full, the water spilled out.)
妈妈一边说话一边为客人倒水。(While talking, mom poured water for the guests at the same time.)

words: 是谁 (shì shéi, who is it)
p3-6.definition-english: Who; whoever
p3-6.sentence: 这本书不知道是谁的。(No one knows whose book this is.)
complex: 因为没有人举手,所以老师不知道是谁做的。(Because no one raised their hand, the teacher did not know who did it.)
同学们一边猜测是谁一边讨论这件事。(While guessing who it was, the classmates discussed the matter at the same time.)
这个游戏不但好玩而且谁都可以参加。(This game is not only fun but also anyone can join.)

p3-6.definition-english: To support; to help up; to lean on
p3-6.sentence: 我扶着奶奶慢慢走下楼梯。(I supported Grandma as she slowly walked down the stairs.)
complex: 虽然爷爷走得很慢,但是他不需要别人扶着。(Although grandpa walks slowly, he does not need others to support him.)
我一边扶着扶手一边慢慢走下楼梯。(While holding the handrail, I slowly walked down the stairs at the same time.)
他不但扶起了摔倒的老人而且送她回家。(He not only helped up the elderly person who fell but also sent her home.)

p3-6.definition-english: To thank; to wither; to decline
p3-6.sentence: 我要谢谢老师这几年的教导。(I want to thank the teacher for her guidance these years.)
complex: 虽然花儿已经凋谢了,但是我们依然很感谢它带来的美丽。(Although the flowers have withered, we are still thankful for the beauty they brought.)
因为老师帮助了我,所以我要谢谢她。(Because the teacher helped me, I want to thank her.)
他不但谢谢老师而且送了一张卡片。(He not only thanked the teacher but also gave her a card.)

p3-7.definition-english: Broken; smashed; a fragment
p3-7.sentence: 弟弟不小心打碎了一个花瓶。(My younger brother accidentally broke a vase.)
complex: 虽然花瓶打碎了,但是妈妈没有生气。(Although the vase was broken, mom wasn't angry.)
因为地板很滑,所以杯子掉下来打碎了。(Because the floor was slippery, the cup fell and broke.)
他一边扫地一边捡起碎片。(He swept the floor while picking up the fragments.)

words: 赔钱 (péi qián, pay for damage)
p3-7.definition-english: To compensate; to pay for damage; to apologize
p3-7.sentence: 他打破了同学的水杯,答应赔偿。(He broke his classmate's cup and promised to pay for the damage.)
complex: 虽然他不是故意的,但是还是要赔偿。(Although he didn't do it on purpose, he still had to compensate.)
因为他弄坏了同学的文具盒,所以要赔钱。(Because he broke his classmate's pencil case, he had to pay for it.)
他不但主动赔钱,而且向同学道歉。(He not only proactively paid for the damage, but also apologized to his classmate.)

p3-7.definition-english: To stay; to keep; to leave behind
p3-7.sentence: 爷爷把这张老照片保留了下来。(Grandpa kept this old photo.)
complex: 虽然照片很旧,但是爷爷还是把它留下了。(Although the photo was old, grandpa still kept it.)
我们一边整理房间一边把有用的东西留下来。(We tidied the room while keeping the useful things.)
哥哥不但成绩好,而且决定去英国留学。(My brother not only has good grades, but also decided to study abroad in England.)

words: 随便 (suí biàn, casual/as you like)
p3-7.definition-english: Convenient; then; cheap; casual
p3-7.sentence: 附近的超市买东西很方便。(Shopping is very convenient at the nearby supermarket.)
complex: 因为超市就在楼下,所以买东西很方便。(Because the supermarket is right downstairs, shopping is very convenient.)
弟弟一边玩玩具一边随便回答妈妈的问题。(My younger brother played with toys while casually answering mom's questions.)
这家店的东西不但便宜,而且质量很好。(This shop's things are not only cheap, but also good quality.)

p3-7.definition-english: A basin; a pot; a tub
p3-7.sentence: 妈妈在阳台上摆了几个花盆。(Mom placed a few flowerpots on the balcony.)
complex: 虽然花盆很重,但是他还是搬到了阳台上。(Although the flowerpot was heavy, he still moved it to the balcony.)
因为妈妈喜欢种花,所以家里有很多花盆。(Because mom likes planting flowers, there are many flowerpots at home.)
他一边洗菜一边把水盆放在桌上。(He washed vegetables while placing the basin on the table.)

p3-7.definition-english: To apologize; sorry; a poor harvest
p3-7.sentence: 他为迟到向老师道歉。(He apologized to the teacher for being late.)
complex: 虽然他心里很抱歉,但是一直不敢开口道歉。(Although he felt very sorry inside, he didn't dare to say sorry.)
因为他说错了话,所以向朋友道歉。(Because he said the wrong thing, he apologized to his friend.)
他不但当面道歉,而且写信表达歉意。(He not only apologized in person, but also wrote a letter to express his regret.)

p3-7.definition-english: A hall; a court; dignified; a generation
p3-7.sentence: 课堂上,大家都认真听讲。(In the classroom, everyone listens attentively.)
complex: 虽然课堂很安静,但是大家都很紧张。(Although the classroom was quiet, everyone was nervous.)
我们一边在食堂吃饭一边聊天。(We ate in the canteen while chatting.)
他不但在课堂上认真听讲,而且经常帮助同学。(He not only listens attentively in class, but also often helps his classmates.)

p3-7.definition-english: To slide; to sneak away; smooth
p3-7.sentence: 星期六,我和朋友一起去溜冰。(On Saturday, I went ice skating with my friends.)
complex: 因为他怕被老师骂,所以偷偷溜走了。(Because he was afraid of being scolded by the teacher, he quietly slipped away.)
我们一边溜冰一边说笑。(We skated while chatting and laughing.)
他溜冰的动作不但顺溜,而且很好看。(His ice-skating movements are not only smooth, but also good-looking.)

words: 踩脚 (cǎi jiǎo, step on someone's foot)
p3-7.definition-english: To step on; to trample
p3-7.sentence: 他不小心踩到了我的脚。(He accidentally stepped on my foot.)
complex: 虽然车厢很挤,但是他小心不踩到别人。(Although the train carriage was crowded, he was careful not to step on others.)
因为地上很暗,所以我不小心踩到了狗的尾巴。(Because the ground was dark, I accidentally stepped on the dog's tail.)
他一边走路一边玩手机,不小心踩到了我的脚。(He walked while playing with his phone, and accidentally stepped on my foot.)

p3-7.definition-english: A mirror; a lens; glasses
p3-7.sentence: 爷爷戴上眼镜看报纸。(Grandpa put on his glasses to read the newspaper.)
complex: 虽然眼镜很贵,但是爸爸还是给我买了一副。(Although the glasses were expensive, dad still bought me a pair.)
因为视力不好,所以他要戴眼镜。(Because his eyesight is poor, he has to wear glasses.)
这副眼镜不但轻,而且很牢固。(These glasses are not only light, but also very sturdy.)

words: 休假 (xiū jià, take a holiday)
p3-7.definition-english: To rest; to stop; vacation
p3-7.sentence: 医生叫他多休息几天。(The doctor told him to rest for a few more days.)
complex: 虽然功课很多,但是他还是抽空休息一下。(Although there was a lot of homework, he still took time to rest a bit.)
爷爷一边听收音机一边休息。(Grandpa listened to the radio while resting.)
他不但按时休息,而且每天运动。(He not only rests on time, but also exercises every day.)

p3-7.definition-english: Breath; rest; news; interest (financial)
p3-7.sentence: 老师宣布了一个好消息。(The teacher announced a piece of good news.)
complex: 因为他跑了很久,所以需要坐下来休息。(Because he had been running for a long time, he needed to sit down and rest.)
他一边喝水一边休息。(He drank water while resting.)
这个消息不但让人惊讶,而且让大家很开心。(This news was not only surprising, but also made everyone happy.)

words: 重视 (zhòng shì, value/attach importance to)
p3-7.definition-english: To see; to look at; to regard; vision
p3-7.sentence: 弟弟每天看电视的时间不能太长。(My younger brother cannot watch TV for too long every day.)
complex: 虽然他很想看电视,但是必须先做完功课。(Although he really wanted to watch TV, he had to finish his homework first.)
因为他的视力不好,所以需要配眼镜。(Because his eyesight is poor, he needs to get glasses.)
弟弟一边吃饭一边看电视。(My younger brother ate while watching TV.)

words: 脱离 (tuō lí, break away from)
摆脱 (bǎi tuō, break free from)
p3-7.definition-english: To take off; to escape; to come off
p3-7.sentence: 进屋前,他先脱下了鞋子。(Before entering the house, he first took off his shoes.)
complex: 虽然天气很冷,但是他进屋后马上脱下外套。(Although the weather was cold, he took off his coat immediately after entering the house.)
因为鞋子很脏,所以他在门口脱下了鞋子。(Because his shoes were dirty, he took them off at the door.)
他不但努力练习,而且终于摆脱了坏习惯。(He not only practiced hard, but also finally got rid of his bad habit.)

p3-7.definition-english: To move; to carry; to transport
p3-7.sentence: 我们全家上个月搬家了。(Our whole family moved house last month.)
complex: 虽然新家比较远,但是我们全家还是决定搬家。(Although the new home was quite far, our whole family still decided to move.)
工人们一边搬运家具一边小心地放好。(The workers moved the furniture while carefully placing it down.)
他不但帮忙搬家具,而且打扫了新家。(He not only helped move the furniture, but also cleaned the new home.)

p3-7.definition-english: A board; a plank; stiff; boss
p3-7.sentence: 老师在黑板上写下了今天的题目。(The teacher wrote today's topic on the blackboard.)
complex: 因为黑板上的字太小,所以我看不清楚。(Because the words on the blackboard were too small, I couldn't see clearly.)
老师一边讲课一边在黑板上写字。(The teacher taught while writing on the blackboard.)
这家店的老板不但友善,而且很有耐心。(This shop's boss is not only friendly, but also very patient.)

p3-7.definition-english: Spirit; soul; clever; effective; flexible
p3-7.sentence: 这只猴子的动作非常灵活。(This monkey's movements are very agile.)
complex: 虽然它只是一只小猴子,但是动作非常灵活。(Although it's just a small monkey, its movements are very agile.)
因为她常常读书,所以很有灵感写作文。(Because she often reads books, she has a lot of inspiration for writing compositions.)
他一边看着风景一边寻找写作的灵感。(He looked at the scenery while searching for writing inspiration.)

p3-7.definition-english: Sick; illness; disease
p3-7.sentence: 他因为生病,今天没有来上学。(He didn't come to school today because he was sick.)
complex: 虽然他生病了,但是还是坚持来上学。(Although he was sick, he still insisted on coming to school.)
因为他淋雨了,所以第二天就生病了。(Because he got caught in the rain, he fell sick the next day.)
医生不但照顾病人,而且教他们保持健康。(The doctor not only takes care of patients, but also teaches them to stay healthy.)

p3-7.definition-english: Light (weight); slight; gentle; easy
p3-7.sentence: 妈妈轻轻地关上了房门。(Mom gently closed the door.)
complex: 虽然考试很难,但是他做得很轻松。(Although the exam was difficult, he did it with ease.)
妈妈一边唱歌一边轻轻地摇着摇篮。(Mom sang while gently rocking the cradle.)
这道题目不但简单,而且能轻易解决。(This question is not only simple, but also can be easily solved.)

words: 路上 (lù shàng, on the road)
p3-7.definition-english: A road; a path; a route
p3-7.sentence: 上学的路上,我遇见了老同学。(On the way to school, I ran into an old classmate.)
complex: 因为下大雨,所以路上的车子很多。(Because it was raining heavily, there was a lot of traffic on the road.)
我们一边走路一边讨论回家的路线。(We walked while discussing the route home.)
这条路不但宽,而且很干净。(This road is not only wide, but also very clean.)

words: 碰巧 (pèng qiǎo, happen to/by chance)
p3-7.definition-english: To bump; to touch; to meet by chance
p3-7.sentence: 我在图书馆碰到了以前的老师。(I ran into my former teacher at the library.)
complex: 虽然公园很大,但是我们还是碰到了老朋友。(Although the park was big, we still ran into an old friend.)
因为我们碰巧同时到达,所以一起走进了电影院。(Because we happened to arrive at the same time, we walked into the cinema together.)
他一边骑脚踏车一边东张西望,差点碰到了树。(He rode his bicycle while looking around, and almost bumped into a tree.)

p3-8.definition-english: To need; to require; necessity
p3-8.sentence: 做实验需要用到很多器材。(Doing the experiment requires a lot of equipment.)
complex: 因为明天要考试,所以我需要好好复习功课。(Because there is an exam tomorrow, I need to study my lessons well.)
我们一边做手工,一边讨论需要用到的材料。(We do handicrafts while discussing the materials we need.)
这个实验不但需要耐心,而且需要细心。(This experiment not only needs patience, but also needs care.)

words: 贺年 (hè nián, New Year greetings)
p3-8.definition-english: To congratulate; to celebrate
p3-8.sentence: 我送给外婆一张生日贺卡。(I gave Grandma a birthday card.)
complex: 虽然我们没有见面,但是我还是写了一张贺卡祝贺他生日快乐。(Although we didn't meet in person, I still wrote a greeting card to congratulate him on his birthday.)
妹妹一边画画一边做贺年卡送给老师。(My little sister draws while making a New Year card to give to the teacher.)
他不但送我贺卡,而且还祝贺我考试得了第一名。(He not only gave me a greeting card, but also congratulated me on getting first place in the exam.)

p3-8.definition-english: A part; a department; a unit; measure word for films/books
p3-8.sentence: 图书馆分成好几个部分。(The library is divided into several sections.)
complex: 虽然这本书很厚,但是我已经看完了大部分。(Although this book is very thick, I have already finished reading most of it.)
因为图书馆的书分成好几个部分,所以找书很方便。(Because the library's books are divided into several sections, finding books is very convenient.)
这个计划不但需要每个部门帮忙,而且需要大家一起努力。(This plan not only needs every department's help, but also needs everyone to work together.)

p3-8.definition-english: To smear; to apply; to scribble; to paint
p3-8.sentence: 妹妹喜欢在纸上涂色。(My little sister likes to color on paper.)
complex: 虽然弟弟画得不好看,但是他还是很努力地涂色。(Although my younger brother doesn't draw well, he still colors very hard.)
因为墙上有小朋友涂鸦的痕迹,所以爸爸要重新粉刷。(Because there were traces of children's graffiti on the wall, dad had to repaint it.)
妹妹一边听音乐一边给图画本涂色。(My little sister listens to music while coloring her drawing book.)

p3-8.definition-english: A hole; a cave; to understand thoroughly
p3-8.sentence: 小兔子躲进了草丛里的一个洞。(The little rabbit hid in a hole in the bushes.)
complex: 因为山洞里很黑,所以我们都不敢走进去。(Because the cave was very dark, we didn't dare to walk in.)
他们一边走一边用手电筒照着洞口。(They walk while shining the flashlight at the cave entrance.)
这个山洞不但很深,而且里面还有蝙蝠。(This cave is not only very deep, but also has bats inside.)

p3-8.definition-english: To hang; to suspend; to mourn
p3-8.sentence: 客厅的天花板上挂着一盏吊灯。(A chandelier hangs from the living room ceiling.)
complex: 虽然那盏吊灯很重,但是工人还是把它安全地吊起来了。(Although that chandelier is very heavy, the workers still hung it up safely.)
工人们一边固定绳子一边慢慢把箱子吊起来。(The workers fix the rope while slowly hoisting the box up.)
客厅里的吊灯不但漂亮,而且很明亮。(The chandelier in the living room is not only beautiful, but also very bright.)

p3-8.definition-english: A cage; a steamer basket; to envelop
p3-8.sentence: 公园里有一个装着小鸟的笼子。(There is a cage with a little bird in the park.)
complex: 虽然笼子很小,但是小鸟在里面还是很开心。(Although the cage is small, the little bird is still happy inside it.)
因为天空被乌云笼罩,所以我们看不到太阳。(Because the sky was enveloped by dark clouds, we couldn't see the sun.)
这个鸟笼不但干净,而且很坚固。(This bird cage is not only clean, but also very sturdy.)

p3-8.definition-english: To hang; to hang up; to register
p3-8.sentence: 妈妈把新买的画挂在墙上。(Mom hung the newly bought painting on the wall.)
complex: 虽然那幅画很重,但是爸爸还是把它挂上了墙。(Although that painting is very heavy, dad still hung it on the wall.)
因为爷爷病得很严重,所以妈妈带他去医院挂号。(Because grandpa was very seriously ill, mom took him to the hospital to register.)
妈妈一边哼歌一边把新买的窗帘挂起来。(Mom hums a tune while hanging up the newly bought curtains.)

p3-8.definition-english: A skirt
p3-8.sentence: 妹妹穿了一条黄色的裙子去参加生日会。(My little sister wore a yellow skirt to the birthday party.)
complex: 因为今天天气很热,所以姐姐穿了一条短裙。(Because the weather is very hot today, my sister wore a short skirt.)
她一边挑选布料一边想象新裙子的样子。(She picks out fabric while imagining what the new skirt will look like.)
这条连衣裙不但好看,而且穿起来很舒服。(This dress is not only pretty, but also comfortable to wear.)

p3-8.definition-english: Trousers; pants
p3-8.sentence: 他把裤子弄脏了,只好回家换一条。(He got his trousers dirty and had to go home to change.)
complex: 虽然天气有点凉,但是弟弟还是坚持穿短裤出门。(Although the weather is a bit cool, my younger brother still insisted on wearing shorts out.)
他一边穿裤子一边哼着歌准备上学。(He puts on his trousers while humming a tune, getting ready for school.)
这条裤子不但耐穿,而且价钱便宜。(These trousers are not only durable, but also cheap.)

p3-8.definition-english: To seek; to request; to demand
p3-8.sentence: 老师要求我们按时交作业。(The teacher requires us to hand in our homework on time.)
complex: 虽然这个要求很难做到,但是我们还是尽力去完成。(Although this requirement is hard to fulfill, we still try our best to complete it.)
因为迷路了,所以他向警察叔叔求助。(Because he got lost, he sought help from a police officer.)
老师不但要求我们认真听课,而且要求我们按时完成作业。(The teacher not only requires us to listen attentively in class, but also requires us to complete homework on time.)

p3-8.definition-english: To compare; relatively; fairly
p3-8.sentence: 这道题比较难,我们要多想想。(This question is relatively difficult; we need to think more about it.)
complex: 虽然这道数学题比较难,但是我最终还是算出了答案。(Although this math problem is relatively difficult, I finally worked out the answer.)
因为哥哥比较喜欢运动,所以他常常去球场较量球技。(Because my brother relatively likes sports, he often goes to the court to compete in ball skills.)
两位同学一边跑步一边较量谁跑得比较快。(The two classmates run while competing to see who runs relatively faster.)

words: 晒干 (shài gān, dry in the sun)
晾晒 (liàng shài, air dry in sun)
p3-8.definition-english: To dry in the sun; to sunbathe
p3-8.sentence: 妈妈把洗好的衣服拿去晒太阳。(Mom took the washed clothes out to dry in the sun.)
complex: 因为今天阳光很好,所以妈妈把衣服拿出去晒太阳。(Because the sunlight is good today, mom took the clothes out to dry in the sun.)
奶奶一边晒衣服一边跟邻居聊天。(Grandma dries clothes in the sun while chatting with the neighbor.)
这些衣服不但晒干了,而且变得很暖和。(These clothes were not only dried in the sun, but also became warm.)

words: 东倒西歪 (dōng dǎo xī wāi, topsy-turvy)
p3-8.definition-english: Crooked; askew; devious
p3-8.sentence: 那幅画挂得有点歪。(That painting is hung a bit crooked.)
complex: 虽然那幅画挂得有点歪,但是妈妈说不用重新挂。(Although that painting is hung a bit crooked, mom said there's no need to rehang it.)
弟弟一边哭一边跑得东倒西歪。(My younger brother cries while running around unsteadily.)
这棵小树不但长得歪斜,而且叶子也不多。(This little tree not only grows crooked, but also doesn't have many leaves.)

words: 乱七八糟 (luàn qī bā zāo, in a mess)
乱跑 (luàn pǎo, run around wildly)
p3-8.definition-english: Chaotic; disorder; a mess; confused
p3-8.sentence: 弟弟把玩具弄得到处都是,房间很乱。(My younger brother scattered his toys everywhere, making the room messy.)
complex: 虽然房间被弟弟弄得乱七八糟,但是妈妈没有生气。(Although the room was made a mess by my younger brother, mom didn't get angry.)
因为操场上人太多,所以场面变得有点混乱。(Because there were too many people on the playground, the scene became a bit chaotic.)
小狗不但在花园里乱跑,而且还把花弄坏了。(The puppy not only ran around wildly in the garden, but also damaged the flowers.)

p3-8.definition-english: Tired; weary; to accumulate; to involve
p3-8.sentence: 打完球以后,我们都感到很累。(After playing ball, we all felt very tired.)
complex: 虽然他已经很累了,但是还是坚持把功课做完。(Although he was already very tired, he still insisted on finishing his homework.)

p3-10.definition-english: Used only in the word 垃圾, meaning rubbish or garbage
p3-10.sentence: 校工每天早上清理垃圾场。(The school worker cleans the rubbish dump every morning.)
complex: 虽然垃圾场很臭,但是校工每天都认真打扫。(Although the rubbish dump smells bad, the school worker cleans it seriously every day.)
他一边整理垃圾袋,一边把垃圾拿到垃圾场去。(He tidied up the rubbish bags while taking the rubbish to the dump at the same time.)
乱扔垃圾不但不卫生,而且会污染环境。(Littering rubbish carelessly is not only unhygienic, but also pollutes the environment.)

p3-10.definition-english: A mosquito, a small flying insect that bites
p3-10.definition-chinese: 蚊子；会叮咬人的小昆虫
p3-10.sentence: 积水的地方容易滋生蚊子。(Places with stagnant water easily breed mosquitoes.)
complex: 虽然蚊子很小,但是它咬人的时候很痒。(Although mosquitoes are small, it is very itchy when they bite people.)
因为房间里有很多蚊子,所以妈妈挂起了蚊帐。(Because there were a lot of mosquitoes in the room, mom hung up a mosquito net.)
蚊子不但吵人,而且还会传播疾病。(Mosquitoes are not only annoying, but also can spread diseases.)

words: 鸦雀无声 (yā què wú shēng, dead silent)
p3-10.definition-english: A crow, a black bird known for its harsh cry
p3-10.sentence: 一只乌鸦停在垃圾桶上找食物。(A crow stopped on the rubbish bin looking for food.)
complex: 虽然乌鸦的叫声不好听,但是它很聪明。(Although the crow's cry doesn't sound nice, it is very clever.)
因为老师走进教室,所以全班鸦雀无声。(Because the teacher walked into the classroom, the whole class fell dead silent.)
乌鸦一边飞一边发出叫声。(The crow flew while making its cry at the same time.)

words: 随地 (suí dì, anywhere/on the ground)
随便 (suí biàn, as one wishes)
p3-10.definition-english: To follow; to do as one pleases; anywhere
p3-10.sentence: 我们不可以随地丢垃圾。(We must not litter anywhere.)
complex: 因为妹妹很随便,所以东西经常乱放。(Because my younger sister is very careless, her things are often left around messily.)
小狗一边跟随主人,一边摇着尾巴。(The puppy followed its owner while wagging its tail at the same time.)
随地吐痰不但不卫生,而且会传播细菌。(Spitting anywhere on the ground is not only unhygienic, but also spreads germs.)

words: 随地吐痰 (suí dì tǔ tán, spit on the ground anywhere)
p3-10.definition-english: Phlegm or sputum from the throat
p3-10.definition-chinese: 喉咙里咳出的东西；吐痰
p3-10.sentence: 随地吐痰是不讲卫生的行为。(Spitting phlegm on the ground is an unhygienic behaviour.)
complex: 虽然他喉咙不舒服,但是他没有随地吐痰。(Although his throat was uncomfortable, he did not spit phlegm on the ground.)
他一边咳嗽,一边把痰吐进痰盂里。(He coughed while spitting phlegm into the spittoon at the same time.)
随地吐痰不但不卫生,而且很不礼貌。(Spitting phlegm on the ground is not only unhygienic, but also very impolite.)

words: 保护环境 (bǎo hù huán jìng, protect the environment)
p3-10.definition-english: A ring or loop; to surround; environment
p3-10.sentence: 保护环境是每个人的责任。(Protecting the environment is everyone's responsibility.)
complex: 虽然打扫环境很累,但是大家都愿意帮忙。(Although cleaning up the environment is tiring, everyone is willing to help.)
因为大家都很关心环保,所以公园变得更干净了。(Because everyone cares about environmental protection, the park has become cleaner.)
保护环境不但重要,而且是我们的责任。(Protecting the environment is not only important, but also our responsibility.)

words: 保护环境 (bǎo hù huán jìng, protect the environment)
p3-10.definition-english: A boundary or condition; environment; situation
p3-10.sentence: 干净的环境让人心情愉快。(A clean environment makes people feel happy.)
complex: 虽然环境很干净,但是我们还是要继续保持。(Although the environment is clean, we still need to continue keeping it that way.)
因为环境被污染了,所以鱼儿都游走了。(Because the environment was polluted, the fish all swam away.)
我们一边捡垃圾,一边讨论怎样保护环境。(We picked up rubbish while discussing how to protect the environment at the same time.)

p3-10.definition-english: A kitchen; place for cooking food
p3-10.sentence: 妈妈每天都在厨房里做饭。(Mom cooks in the kitchen every day.)
complex: 因为今天是妈妈生日,所以爸爸下厨煮了一顿丰盛的晚餐。(Because today is mom's birthday, dad cooked in the kitchen and made a wonderful dinner.)
厨师一边炒菜,一边哼着歌。(The chef stir-fried food while humming a song at the same time.)
那位厨师做的菜不但好吃,而且很健康。(The dishes made by that chef are not only delicious, but also healthy.)

words: 脏乱 (zāng luàn, dirty and messy)
又脏又臭 (yòu zāng yòu chòu, dirty and smelly)
p3-10.definition-english: Dirty; unclean; not tidy
p3-10.sentence: 他把衣服弄脏了,需要重新洗一次。(He got his clothes dirty and needs to wash them again.)
complex: 虽然衣服弄脏了,但是妹妹一点也不担心。(Although the clothes got dirty, my younger sister wasn't worried at all.)
他一边打扫,一边清理又脏又臭的角落。(He swept the floor while cleaning up the dirty and smelly corner at the same time.)
那个房间不但脏乱,而且还有一股怪味。(That room is not only dirty and messy, but also has a strange smell.)

p3-10.definition-english: A cupboard or cabinet for storing things
p3-10.sentence: 妹妹把玩具收进了衣橱里。(My little sister put her toys away in the wardrobe.)
complex: 虽然衣橱很旧,但是里面还放得下很多衣服。(Although the wardrobe is old, it can still hold a lot of clothes inside.)
因为书橱里的书太多了,所以哥哥买了一个新的书橱。(Because there were too many books in the bookcase, my older brother bought a new bookcase.)
这个橱柜不但美观,而且很实用。(This cupboard is not only good-looking, but also very practical.)

words: 仔细检查 (zǐ xì jiǎn chá, examine carefully)
仔细观察 (zǐ xì guān chá, observe carefully)
p3-10.definition-english: Careful; attentive; detailed
p3-10.sentence: 老师提醒我们做事要仔细一点。(The teacher reminded us to be a bit more careful when doing things.)
complex: 虽然题目很难,但是他仔细地想了很久才作答。(Although the question was difficult, he thought carefully for a long time before answering.)
因为老师要我们仔细检查作业,所以大家都看了两遍。(Because the teacher wanted us to check our homework carefully, everyone looked through it twice.)
他一边仔细观察蚂蚁,一边把发现记录下来。(He carefully observed the ants while recording his discoveries at the same time.)

p3-10.definition-english: To beckon; to wave; to recruit or attract
p3-10.sentence: 看到朋友,我立刻招手打招呼。(When I saw my friend, I immediately waved to greet him.)
complex: 因为看见老师走过来,所以我们连忙招手打招呼。(Because we saw the teacher walking over, we hurriedly waved to greet him.)
她一边招手,一边大声叫朋友的名字。(She waved while calling out her friend's name loudly at the same time.)
那家店的招牌不但大,而且很好看。(That shop's signboard is not only big, but also very good-looking.)

words: 下定决心 (xià dìng jué xīn, make up one's mind)
p3-10.definition-english: To decide; to determine; to resolve
p3-10.sentence: 我们决定一起去清理公园里的垃圾。(We decided to go clean up the rubbish in the park together.)
complex: 虽然问题很难,但是我们决定一起解决它。(Although the problem is difficult, we decided to solve it together.)
我们一边讨论,一边想办法解决问题。(We discussed the problem while thinking of ways to solve it at the same time.)
这个方法不但能解决问题,而且很简单。(This method can not only solve the problem, but also is very simple.)

words: 惊叫 (jīng jiào, cry out in fright)
大吃一惊 (dà chī yī jīng, greatly startled)
p3-10.definition-english: To startle; to frighten; to be surprised
p3-10.sentence: 突然跳出来的青蛙让她大吃一惊。(The frog that suddenly jumped out gave her a big fright.)
complex: 虽然他看到蛇很害怕,但是他没有惊叫出声。(Although he was scared when he saw the snake, he did not cry out in fright.)
因为成绩进步了很多,所以妈妈感到十分惊讶。(Because his grades improved a lot, mom felt very surprised.)
这个消息不但让人惊讶,而且让人非常高兴。(This news is not only surprising, but also makes people very happy.)

p3-10.definition-english: To shrink; to contract; to pull back
p3-10.sentence: 小猫受惊后缩成了一团。(The kitten curled up into a ball after being startled.)
complex: 虽然困难重重,但是他没有退缩。(Although there were many difficulties, he did not shrink back.)
因为衣服洗错了方法,所以它缩小了很多。(Because the clothes were washed the wrong way, they shrank a lot.)
小猫一边发抖,一边把身体缩成一团。(The kitten trembled while curling its body into a ball at the same time.)

words: 扔垃圾 (rēng lā jī, throw rubbish)
乱扔垃圾 (luàn rēng lā jī, litter rubbish carelessly)
p3-10.definition-english: To throw; to toss; to discard
p3-10.sentence: 请不要把垃圾乱扔在地上。(Please do not throw rubbish carelessly on the ground.)
complex: 因为他随手乱扔垃圾,所以老师严厉地批评了他。(Because he carelessly threw rubbish around, the teacher scolded him sternly.)
他一边走路,一边把糖果纸扔在地上。(He walked while throwing the candy wrapper on the ground at the same time.)
乱扔垃圾不但不文明,而且会破坏环境。(Littering carelessly is not only uncivilized, but also damages the environment.)

words: 保持卫生 (bǎo chí wèi shēng, maintain hygiene)
保护环境 (bǎo hù huán jìng, protect the environment)
p3-10.definition-english: To protect; to keep; to guarantee
p3-10.sentence: 大家应该一起保护环境。(Everyone should work together to protect the environment.)
complex: 虽然保护环境不容易,但是我们还是要努力去做。(Although protecting the environment is not easy, we still need to work hard at it.)
他们一边捡垃圾,一边宣传环保的重要性。(They picked up rubbish while promoting the importance of environmental protection at the same time.)
保持卫生不但能保护环境,而且能保护我们的健康。(Maintaining hygiene can not only protect the environment, but also protect our health.)

words: 保持卫生 (bǎo chí wèi shēng, maintain hygiene)
p3-10.definition-english: To hold; to maintain; to sustain
p3-10.sentence: 我们要保持环境的整洁。(We must keep the environment clean and tidy.)
complex: 虽然很辛苦,但是他一直坚持每天运动。(Although it's tiring, he keeps persisting in exercising every day.)
因为大家都保持卫生,所以教室一直很干净。(Because everyone maintains hygiene, the classroom is always clean.)
他不但坚持每天运动,而且身体越来越好。(He not only persists in exercising every day, but also his health keeps getting better.)

words: 保持卫生 (bǎo chí wèi shēng, maintain hygiene)
p3-10.definition-english: To guard; to protect; hygiene, defense
p3-10.sentence: 保持个人卫生可以减少生病的机会。(Keeping personal hygiene can reduce the chance of falling sick.)
complex: 虽然打扫卫生间很辛苦,但是校工每天都做得很干净。(Although cleaning the toilet is tiring, the school worker does it very cleanly every day.)
因为大家都注重卫生,所以生病的同学变少了。(Because everyone pays attention to hygiene, fewer classmates fall sick.)
他一边洗手,一边提醒弟弟要保持卫生。(He washed his hands while reminding his younger brother to maintain hygiene at the same time.)

words: 爱护 (ài hù, cherish/take care of)
保护环境 (bǎo hù huán jìng, protect the environment)
p3-10.definition-english: To protect; to guard; to shield
p3-10.sentence: 我们要爱护校园里的花草树木。(We should take care of the flowers, plants and trees in our school.)
complex: 因为妹妹生病了,所以护士细心地照顾她。(Because my younger sister was sick, the nurse took careful care of her.)
我们一边浇水,一边说要保护校园里的花草。(We watered the plants while saying we should protect the flowers and grass in the school at the same time.)
