words: 周末的时候 (zhōu mò de shí hou, during the weekend)
p3-10.definition-english: A week; all around; surrounding
p3-10.sentence: 他环顾四周,发现地上有很多垃圾。(He looked around and found a lot of rubbish on the ground.)
complex: 虽然周末应该休息,但是他还是主动去打扫周围的环境。(Although one should rest on the weekend, he still took the initiative to clean up the surrounding environment.)
他一边散步,一边观察四周的风景。(He took a walk while observing the scenery around him at the same time.)
周末的活动不但有趣,而且能让我们学到新知识。(The weekend activity is not only fun, but also lets us learn new knowledge.)

words: 期末 (qī mò, end of term)
周末的时候 (zhōu mò de shí hou, during the weekend)
p3-10.definition-english: The end; the tip; the last part

complex: 虽然期末考试快到了,但是他周末还是抽空运动。(Although the final exams are coming soon, he still finds time to exercise on the weekend.)

words: 转身离开 (zhuǎn shēn lí kāi, turn around and leave)
p3-10.definition-english: To turn; to rotate; to change direction
p3-10.sentence: 他转身一看,发现乌鸦在垃圾桶旁边。(He turned around and saw a crow next to the rubbish bin.)

怎么回事 (zěn me huí shì, what's going on?)

complex: 虽然他不知道怎么办,但是他还是冷静地想办法。(Although he didn't know what to do, he still calmly tried to think of a way.)

他不但不知道怎么办,而且越来越紧张。(He not only didn't know what to do, but also became more and more nervous.)

words: 追上 (zhuī shàng, catch up with)
能追得上 (néng zhuī de shàng, able to catch up with)
p3-10.definition-english: To chase; to pursue; to run after
p3-10.sentence: 他大声追问是谁乱扔垃圾。(He loudly questioned who had littered carelessly.)
complex: 虽然弟弟跑得很快,但是还是追不上哥哥。(Although my younger brother runs fast, he still cannot catch up with his older brother.)
因为老师想知道是谁乱扔垃圾,所以追问了好几个同学。(Because the teacher wanted to know who littered, she questioned several students closely.)
他不但跑得快,而且很快就追上了前面的同学。(He not only runs fast, but also quickly caught up with the classmate in front.)

words: 塑料袋 (sù liào dài, plastic bag)
p3-11.definition-english: A bag or sack used to hold or carry things.
p3-11.sentence: 妈妈出门买菜,记得带上环保袋。(Mom remembers to bring a reusable bag when she goes out to buy groceries.)
complex: 因为塑料袋会污染海洋,所以妈妈买菜时都用布袋。(Because plastic bags pollute the ocean, mom always uses a cloth bag when buying groceries.)
妈妈一边逛街,一边把买到的东西放进袋子里。(Mom put the things she bought into the bag while shopping.)
这个布袋不但结实,而且很环保。(This cloth bag is not only sturdy, but also eco-friendly.)

p3-11.definition-english: To take the place of something; a period of time or generation.
p3-11.sentence: 我们要用环保袋代替塑料袋。(We should use reusable bags to replace plastic bags.)
complex: 虽然布袋要多花一点钱,但是它可以代替塑料袋,保护环境。(Although a cloth bag costs a bit more, it can replace plastic bags and protect the environment.)
爷爷一边喝茶,一边说现代科技越来越方便了。(Grandpa drank tea while saying modern technology is becoming more and more convenient.)
布袋不但环保,而且可以代替塑料袋。(Cloth bags are not only eco-friendly, but can also replace plastic bags.)

p3-11.english: to replace, substitute, on behalf of
words: 替代品 (tì dài pǐn, substitute item)
p3-11.definition-english: To take the place of someone or something.
p3-11.sentence: 布袋可以替代塑料袋。(Cloth bags can replace plastic bags.)
complex: 虽然这个替代品比较贵,但是它更环保。(Although this substitute is more expensive, it is more eco-friendly.)
因为旧水瓶破了,所以我要买一个新的替换它。(Because the old water bottle is broken, I need to buy a new one to replace it.)
这种袋子不但结实,而且可以替代塑料袋。(This kind of bag is not only sturdy, but can also replace plastic bags.)

words: 塑料袋 (sù liào dài, plastic bag)
塑造 (sù zào, to mold, to shape)
p3-11.definition-english: A synthetic material, plastic; to mold or shape.
p3-11.sentence: 塑料袋对环境有害。(Plastic bags are harmful to the environment.)
complex: 虽然塑料很方便,但是它会污染环境。(Although plastic is convenient, it pollutes the environment.)
因为塑料袋不容易分解,所以我们应该少用。(Because plastic bags don't easily decompose, we should use them less.)
妈妈一边听广播,一边把塑料袋收进抽屉里。(Mom put the plastic bags into the drawer while listening to the radio.)

p3-11.english: to brake, to stop a vehicle
words: 急刹车 (jí shā chē, to brake suddenly)
刹车片 (shā chē piàn, brake pad)

complex: 因为前面有一只猫,所以爸爸马上刹车。(Because there was a cat ahead, dad braked immediately.)
他一边下坡,一边慢慢刹车。(He slowly braked while going downhill.)
这辆脚踏车的刹车不但灵敏,而且很安全。(This bicycle's brakes are not only sensitive, but also very safe.)

p3-11.definition-english: To use something, or to cause something to happen.
p3-11.sentence: 我们应该少使用塑料制品。(We should use fewer plastic products.)
complex: 虽然这个产品很贵,但是使用起来很方便。(Although this product is expensive, it is very convenient to use.)
姐姐一边使用电脑,一边听音乐。(My sister used the computer while listening to music.)
这种袋子不但环保,而且使用者很多。(This kind of bag is not only eco-friendly, but also has many users.)

p3-11.definition-english: Something discarded or no longer useful; to waste.
p3-11.sentence: 旧报纸也可以废物利用。(Old newspapers can also be reused and recycled.)
complex: 虽然这些是废纸,但是我们可以废物利用。(Although this is waste paper, we can reuse it.)

p3-11.definition-english: A container, usually made of glass or plastic, for holding liquids.

complex: 虽然这个花瓶很旧了,但是奶奶还是很喜欢它。(Although this vase is old, grandma still likes it very much.)
因为水瓶破了,所以哥哥买了一个新的。(Because the water bottle broke, my brother bought a new one.)
哥哥一边做运动,一边喝水瓶里的水。(My brother drank water from his water bottle while exercising.)
