p3-11.sentence: 我们要环保,并且节省用水。(We should protect the environment, and also save water.)
complex: 因为两个小组人数太少,所以老师把它们合并了。(Because the two groups had too few members, the teacher merged them.)
妈妈一边听音乐,一边整理房间,并且把旧报纸拿去回收。(Mom tidied the room while listening to music, and also took the old newspapers for recycling.)
这个环保建议不但很好,而且并不难做到。(This eco-friendly suggestion is not only good, but also not difficult to achieve.)

words: 太平洋 (tài píng yáng, Pacific Ocean)
p3-11.definition-english: The vast ocean; a large body of sea water.
p3-11.sentence: 垃圾污染了海洋,伤害了海洋生物。(Rubbish pollutes the ocean and harms marine life.)
complex: 虽然海洋很美丽,但是它也需要我们保护。(Although the ocean is beautiful, it also needs our protection.)
我们一边看海洋纪录片,一边做笔记。(We watched an ocean documentary while taking notes.)
太平洋不但很大,而且里面有很多海洋生物。(The Pacific Ocean is not only very big, but also has many marine creatures in it.)

words: 用品 (yòng pǐn, daily items, supplies)
p3-11.definition-english: An item or product; goods made or sold.
p3-11.sentence: 购买日常用品时,要选择环保的产品。(When buying daily necessities, choose environmentally friendly products.)
complex: 虽然这件用品很便宜,但是质量不太好。(Although this item is cheap, its quality is not very good.)
因为这个产品很环保,所以很多人喜欢买。(Because this product is eco-friendly, many people like to buy it.)
这些日常用品不但便宜,而且很耐用。(These daily necessities are not only cheap, but also durable.)

words: 负责 (fù zé, to be responsible)
p3-11.definition-english: A duty or obligation one must fulfil; to blame.
p3-11.sentence: 保护环境是每个人的责任。(Protecting the environment is everyone's responsibility.)
complex: 虽然打扫课室很辛苦,但是这是我们的责任。(Although cleaning the classroom is tiring, it is our responsibility.)
因为他打破了花瓶,所以老师责怪了他。(Because he broke the vase, the teacher scolded him.)
哥哥一边听音乐,一边负责打扫房间。(My brother was in charge of cleaning the room while listening to music.)

p3-11.english: duty, task, to allow, to appoint
p3-11.definition-english: A duty, task, or responsibility given to someone.
p3-11.sentence: 老师给我们一个任务,要减少浪费。(The teacher gave us a task to reduce waste.)
complex: 因为老师给我们一个任务,所以大家都很努力完成。(Because the teacher gave us a task, everyone worked hard to complete it.)
弟弟一边听故事,一边完成老师交代的任务。(My younger brother completed the task assigned by the teacher while listening to a story.)
这个任务不但有趣,而且很有意义。(This task is not only interesting, but also meaningful.)

p3-11.english: if, such as, to be like
p3-11.definition-english: Used to mean 'if' when introducing a condition, or 'like/such as' when giving an example.
p3-11.sentence: 如果每个人都节约用水,环境就会更好。(If everyone saves water, the environment will be better.)
complex: 虽然弟弟不知道如何环保,但是他很想学习。(Although my brother doesn't know how to be eco-friendly, he really wants to learn.)
姐姐一边看书,一边思考如何解决问题。(My sister thought about how to solve the problem while reading.)
他不但知道如何环保,而且每天都做到。(He not only knows how to be eco-friendly, but also does it every day.)

p3-11.english: utmost, to exhaust, to the greatest extent
words: 尽力 (jìn lì, to try one's best)
尽一份力 (jìn yí fèn lì, to do one's part)
尽量 (jǐn liàng, as much as possible)
p3-11.definition-english: To use up all of one's effort; to do one's utmost.
p3-11.sentence: 为了保护环境,大家要尽一份力。(To protect the environment, everyone should do their part.)
complex: 虽然这件事不容易,但是我们要尽力去做。(Although this is not easy, we should try our best to do it.)
因为大家都想保护环境,所以我们要尽一份力。(Because everyone wants to protect the environment, we should do our part.)
我们不但要尽力学习,而且要尽量节约用水。(We should not only try our best to study, but also save water as much as possible.)

words: 一份 (yí fèn, a portion, a copy)
尽一份力 (jìn yí fèn lì, to do one's part)
p3-11.definition-english: A portion, share, or copy of something.
p3-11.sentence: 每个人都应该尽一份力,爱护环境。(Everyone should do their part to take care of the environment.)
complex: 虽然只是一份小小的努力,但是也能帮助环境。(Although it is just a small effort, it can still help the environment.)
因为大家都想保护地球,所以每个人都尽一份力。(Because everyone wants to protect the earth, everyone does their part.)
妈妈一边听音乐,一边把旧衣服分成几份,准备捐出去。(Mom divided the old clothes into portions to donate while listening to music.)

words: 循环 (xún huán, to recycle, cycle)
p3-11.definition-english: Relating to the environment; a ring or loop shape.
p3-11.sentence: 环保从我做起。(Environmental protection starts with me.)
complex: 因为大家都很关心环境,所以学校举办了环保活动。(Because everyone cares about the environment, the school held an environmental protection activity.)
我们一边听老师讲解,一边制作环保手工。(We listened to the teacher's explanation while making eco-friendly crafts.)
环保不但能保护环境,而且能让我们的生活更健康。(Environmental protection can not only protect the environment, but also make our lives healthier.)

p3-11.english: to pack, to install, to pretend, clothing
p3-11.definition-english: To pack or wrap something, or to install; packaging.
p3-11.sentence: 买东西时,过多的包装会造成浪费。(When shopping, excessive packaging causes waste.)
complex: 虽然包装很漂亮,但是里面用了太多塑料。(Although the packaging is beautiful, it uses too much plastic inside.)
妈妈一边逛街,一边把购物袋装满。(Mom filled up the shopping bag while strolling through the shops.)
这个包装不但简单,而且很环保。(This packaging is not only simple, but also eco-friendly.)

words: 回报 (huí bào, to repay, to return)
举报 (jǔ bào, to report an offence)
p3-11.definition-english: To announce or report information; a newspaper.
p3-11.sentence: 看完的旧报纸,可以拿去回收。(Old newspapers that have been read can be taken for recycling.)
complex: 虽然这份报纸旧了,但是还可以拿去回收。(Although this newspaper is old, it can still be taken for recycling.)
因为他乱丢垃圾,所以同学把这件事举报给老师。(Because he littered, his classmate reported it to the teacher.)
爱护环境不但能得到回报,而且能让大家生活得更好。(Taking care of the environment not only brings rewards, but also makes everyone live better.)

words: 组织 (zǔ zhī, to organize, organization)
组成 (zǔ chéng, to form, to compose)
p3-11.definition-english: A group of people or things; to organize or form.
p3-11.sentence: 老师把我们分成几个小组,一起做环保海报。(The teacher divided us into several small groups to make environmental posters together.)
complex: 虽然我们组的人数不多,但是大家都很团结。(Although our group doesn't have many members, everyone is very united.)
因为环保活动需要分工,所以老师把我们分成小组。(Because the environmental activity needed division of labour, the teacher divided us into small groups.)
我们一边吃点心,一边讨论如何组织环保活动。(We ate snacks while discussing how to organize the environmental activity.)

p3-11.definition-english: A house or room where people live.
p3-11.sentence: 我们要保持屋子干净,减少垃圾。(We should keep our house clean and reduce rubbish.)
complex: 因为屋子里太乱了,所以妈妈叫我整理房间。(Because the house was too messy, mom told me to tidy up my room.)
爸爸一边听广播,一边打扫屋子。(Dad swept the house while listening to the radio.)
我们的屋子不但干净,而且很环保。(Our house is not only clean, but also eco-friendly.)

words: 场所 (chǎng suǒ, a place, venue)
p3-11.definition-english: A place or venue where an activity takes place.
p3-11.sentence: 学校设立了一个回收场所,方便大家丢旧物。(The school set up a recycling place, making it convenient for everyone to dispose of old items.)
complex: 虽然广场很大,但是我们很快就找到了回收箱。(Although the square is big, we quickly found the recycling bin.)
同学们一边在广场玩耍,一边捡起地上的垃圾。(The classmates played in the square while picking up litter from the ground.)
这个场所不但干净,而且很安全。(This place is not only clean, but also very safe.)

words: 一辆车 (yí liàng chē, one vehicle)
两辆自行车 (liǎng liàng zì xíng chē, two bicycles)
p3-11.definition-english: A measure word used for counting vehicles.
p3-11.definition-chinese: 一辆车；车辆；两辆自行车
p3-11.sentence: 校门口停了好几辆脚踏车。(Several bicycles are parked at the school gate.)
complex: 虽然那辆脚踏车很旧,但是骑起来还是很顺畅。(Although that bicycle is old, it still rides smoothly.)
因为校门口停了太多辆脚踏车,所以老师叫大家排好。(Because too many bicycles were parked at the school gate, the teacher told everyone to line them up neatly.)
这辆车不但省油,而且不会污染环境。(This vehicle is not only fuel-efficient, but also does not pollute the environment.)

words: 流浪 (liú làng, to wander, homeless)
p3-11.definition-english: A wave in water; to waste something needlessly.
p3-11.sentence: 我们不应该浪费食物。(We should not waste food.)
complex: 虽然剩下的食物不多,但是我们也不应该浪费。(Although there isn't much food left, we still shouldn't waste it.)
因为哥哥浪费了很多水,所以爸爸提醒他要节约。(Because my brother wasted a lot of water, dad reminded him to conserve it.)
我们一边在沙滩散步,一边看着海浪。(We took a walk along the beach while watching the sea waves.)

words: 免费 (miǎn fèi, free of charge)
p3-11.definition-english: A fee or cost; to spend or use up resources wastefully.
p3-11.sentence: 随手关灯可以节省电费,减少浪费。(Turning off lights when not needed can save electricity costs and reduce waste.)
complex: 因为我们想省钱,所以尽量减少不必要的费用。(Because we want to save money, we try to reduce unnecessary expenses.)
姐姐一边关灯,一边说这样可以节省费用。(My sister turned off the lights while saying this can save on costs.)
随手关灯不但可以节省费用,而且能减少浪费。(Turning off lights not only saves on costs, but also reduces waste.)

p3-11.definition-english: Used to mean 'therefore'; also refers to a place.
p3-11.sentence: 因为塑料袋会污染环境,所以我们要少用。(Because plastic bags pollute the environment, we should use them less.)
complex: 虽然回收场所有点远,但是我们还是决定走过去。(Although the recycling place is a bit far, we still decided to walk there.)
我们一边走路,一边寻找附近的回收场所。(We looked for a nearby recycling place while walking.)
这个场所不但方便,而且很受大家欢迎。(This place is not only convenient, but also very popular among everyone.)

p3-11.english: to recognize, to think/believe, to admit
words: 认为 (rèn wéi, to think, to believe)
认识 (rèn shi, to know, to recognize)
p3-11.definition-english: To hold an opinion or belief; to recognize or acknowledge.
p3-11.sentence: 我认为每个人都应该爱护环境。(I believe everyone should take care of the environment.)
complex: 虽然一开始不明白,但是我渐渐认识到环保的重要性。(Although I didn't understand at first, I gradually came to realize the importance of environmental protection.)
因为他做错了事,所以他勇敢地承认了错误。(Because he did something wrong, he bravely admitted his mistake.)
我们不但要认识环保的知识,而且要认真去做。(We should not only get to know environmental knowledge, but also earnestly put it into practice.)

p3-12.definition-english: To design, arrange, or set something up.
p3-12.sentence: 我们正在设计一面新的旗子。(We are designing a new flag.)
complex: 虽然设计新校服很难,但是老师们做到了。(Although designing the new school uniform was difficult, the teachers managed to do it.)
因为学校要举办运动会,所以老师们正在设计海报。(Because the school is going to hold a sports day, the teachers are designing posters.)
哥哥一边听音乐,一边设计他的机器人。(Older brother designs his robot while listening to music.)

p3-12.definition-english: To plan, count, or calculate.
p3-12.sentence: 我计划画一幅漂亮的国旗。(I plan to draw a beautiful national flag.)
complex: 虽然计划很简单,但是大家都很喜欢。(Although the plan is simple, everyone likes it.)
因为明天要考试,所以我正在计算数学题。(Because there's a test tomorrow, I am calculating math problems.)
他不但计划得很仔细,而且做得很认真。(He not only planned carefully, but also carried it out seriously.)

p3-12.definition-english: A flag, a piece of cloth with a design representing a country or group.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节那天,操场上挂满了红旗。(On National Day, the playground is filled with red flags.)
complex: 虽然风很大,但是国旗还是升起来了。(Although the wind was strong, the national flag was still raised.)
我们一边唱国歌,一边看着国旗升起。(We watch the national flag rise while singing the national anthem.)
这面旗子不但颜色鲜艳,而且样子好看。(This flag is not only brightly colored, but also looks nice.)

p3-12.english: measure word for small round things
words: 一颗星 (yì kē xīng, one star)
一颗心 (yì kē xīn, one heart)
p3-12.definition-english: A measure word used for small round objects like stars, hearts, or grains.
p3-12.sentence: 夜空中有一颗又大又亮的星星。(There is a big bright star in the night sky.)
complex: 因为天气很晴朗,所以我看到了一颗明亮的星星。(Because the weather was clear, I saw a bright star.)
弟弟一边看夜空,一边数着一颗颗星星。(Younger brother looks at the night sky while counting the stars one by one.)
他不但爱惜每一颗米粒,而且从不浪费食物。(He not only cherishes every grain of rice, but also never wastes food.)

words: 去世 (qù shì, to pass away)
p3-12.definition-english: The world; a generation or era.
p3-12.sentence: 世界上有很多不同的国家和民族。(There are many different countries and ethnic groups in the world.)
complex: 虽然世界很大,但是我们都住在同一个地球上。(Although the world is big, we all live on the same Earth.)
因为她很喜欢地理,所以她认识很多世界上的国家。(Because she likes geography, she knows many countries in the world.)
我们一边看世界地图,一边认识不同的国家。(We look at the world map while learning about different countries.)

p3-12.definition-english: A boundary or realm; the world.
p3-12.sentence: 世界上有两百多个国家。(There are more than two hundred countries in the world.)
complex: 虽然两个国家有边界,但是人民常常互相往来。(Although the two countries have a border, the people often visit each other.)
因为地图上画着清楚的界限,所以我们很容易分辨国家。(Because the map clearly shows the boundaries, we can easily distinguish the countries.)
世界不但很大,而且充满了有趣的事物。(The world is not only big, but also full of interesting things.)

p3-12.definition-english: An ethnic group or clan of people sharing common ancestry.
p3-12.sentence: 新加坡有华族,马来族和印度族。(Singapore has the Chinese, Malay, and Indian ethnic groups.)
complex: 虽然新加坡有不同的民族,但是大家都和睦相处。(Although Singapore has different ethnic groups, everyone gets along harmoniously.)
我们一边庆祝节日,一边了解各个民族的文化。(We celebrate the festival while learning about the culture of each ethnic group.)
这个民族不但历史悠久,而且文化丰富。(This ethnic group not only has a long history, but also has a rich culture.)

p3-12.definition-english: To print or stamp; also part of the country name India.
p3-12.sentence: 他在纸上盖了一个红色的印。(He stamped a red mark on the paper.)
complex: 因为他不小心碰到了墨水,所以纸上留下了一个手印。(Because he accidentally touched the ink, a handprint was left on the paper.)
他一边检查错字,一边印刷海报。(He checks for typos while printing the poster.)
这本书不但印刷精美,而且内容有趣。(This book is not only beautifully printed, but also has interesting content.)

p3-12.definition-english: A degree or measure; also used in country names like India.
p3-12.sentence: 印度是世界上人口很多的国家。(India is a country with a very large population.)
complex: 虽然印度离新加坡很远,但是很多新加坡人去过那里。(Although India is far from Singapore, many Singaporeans have been there.)
因为今天的温度很高,所以大家都想喝冷饮。(Because today's temperature is high, everyone wants to drink something cold.)
妈妈一边给我量体温,一边记录温度。(Mom takes my temperature while recording the reading.)

p3-12.definition-english: To clip, pinch, or hold something between two surfaces.
p3-12.sentence: 妈妈用夹子把衣服夹在绳子上。(Mother used clips to clip the clothes onto the line.)
complex: 虽然这个夹子很小,但是很好用。(Although this clip is small, it's very useful.)
因为纸张很多,所以老师用夹子把它们夹住。(Because there were many sheets of paper, the teacher clipped them together with a clip.)
这个文件夹不但夹住了所有的纸,而且很整齐。(This folder not only clips all the papers together, but also looks neat.)

p3-12.definition-english: Other; among; used to refer to something previously mentioned.
p3-12.sentence: 班上有三十个学生,其中一半是女生。(There are thirty students in the class, half of them are girls.)
complex: 虽然其他同学都做完了,但是我还没有写完。(Although the other classmates have all finished, I haven't finished writing yet.)
老师一边上课,一边举出其他的例子。(The teacher gives other examples while conducting the lesson.)
这本书不但有趣,而且其中有很多图片。(This book is not only interesting, but also has many pictures in it.)

words: 竖起 (shù qǐ, to stand upright/raise)
p3-12.definition-english: To stand something upright; vertical.
p3-12.sentence: 他竖起大拇指,夸我做得好。(He gave a thumbs up, praising me for doing well.)
complex: 因为学校要挂国旗,所以工人们竖起了一根新的旗杆。(Because the school needed to fly the national flag, the workers erected a new flagpole.)
工人们一边测量,一边把柱子竖立起来。(The workers measure while erecting the pillar upright.)
这根柱子不但竖得很直,而且非常牢固。(This pillar is not only erected very straight, but also very sturdy.)

p3-12.definition-english: The thumb, the first and thickest finger.
p3-12.sentence: 他竖起大拇指为我加油。(He gave me a thumbs up to cheer me on.)
complex: 虽然他的拇指受伤了,但是还是坚持写字。(Although his thumb was injured, he still insisted on writing.)
因为妹妹表演得很好,所以大家都竖起大拇指。(Because my little sister performed well, everyone gave her a thumbs up.)
他一边微笑,一边竖起大拇指夸我。(He smiles while giving me a thumbs up in praise.)

p3-12.definition-english: A riddle or mystery that needs to be solved.
p3-12.sentence: 老师给我们出了一个有趣的谜语。(The teacher gave us an interesting riddle.)
complex: 虽然这个谜语很难,但是我最后猜对了。(Although this riddle was difficult, I guessed it correctly in the end.)
因为大家都很喜欢猜谜,所以老师出了很多谜语。(Because everyone likes guessing riddles, the teacher gave many riddles.)
这个谜语不但有趣,而且能让我们多动脑筋。(This riddle is not only interesting, but also makes us use our brains more.)

p3-12.definition-english: To unite or group together; a round mass or organization.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节让我们的国家更加团结。(National Day makes our country more united.)
complex: 虽然大家意见不同,但是最后还是团结一致。(Although everyone had different opinions, in the end they still united as one.)
一家人一边吃晚饭,一边享受团圆的时刻。(The family eats dinner together while enjoying the moment of reunion.)
我们班不但团结,而且互相帮助。(Our class is not only united, but also helps each other.)

p3-12.definition-english: Excited; to strive energetically.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节那天,大家都很兴奋。(Everyone is very excited on National Day.)
complex: 因为明天就是国庆节,所以大家都很兴奋。(Because tomorrow is National Day, everyone is very excited.)
运动员们一边训练,一边为比赛奋斗。(The athletes train while striving hard for the competition.)
她不但勤奋,而且从不放弃。(She is not only diligent, but also never gives up.)

p3-12.definition-english: Crystal; sparkling and clear.
p3-12.sentence: 晚上的星星像水晶一样闪闪发亮。(The stars at night sparkle like crystals.)
complex: 虽然水晶很漂亮,但是价钱很贵。(Although crystal is beautiful, it is expensive.)
因为阳光照射,所以露珠看起来亮晶晶的。(Because of the sunlight, the dewdrops look sparkling and bright.)
她一边欣赏水晶,一边露出开心的笑容。(She admires the crystal while showing a happy smile.)

words: 狮子座 (shī zi zuò, Leo constellation)
p3-12.definition-english: A lion, a large wild cat known as the king of animals.
p3-12.sentence: 新加坡的国徽上有一只狮子。(Singapore's national emblem has a lion on it.)
complex: 虽然狮子看起来很凶猛,但是它们其实很怕人。(Although lions look fierce, they are actually afraid of people.)
因为农历新年到了,所以广场上有精彩的舞狮表演。(Because Chinese New Year has arrived, there is an exciting lion dance performance in the square.)
这只狮子不但强壮,而且跑得很快。(This lion is not only strong, but also runs very fast.)

words: 虎年 (hǔ nián, Year of the Tiger)
p3-12.definition-english: A tiger, a large striped wild cat.
p3-12.sentence: 动物园里的老虎又大又凶猛。(The tiger at the zoo is big and fierce.)
complex: 虽然老虎很凶猛,但是它也需要保护。(Although tigers are fierce, they also need protection.)
老虎一边走动,一边发出低沉的吼声。(The tiger walks around while letting out a low roar.)
这只老虎不但身体强壮,而且反应敏捷。(This tiger is not only strong, but also quick to react.)

words: 华人 (huá rén, ethnic Chinese person)
p3-12.definition-english: Relating to China or the Chinese people; splendid.
p3-12.sentence: 很多华人庆祝中华文化的节日。(Many Chinese people celebrate festivals of Chinese culture.)
complex: 因为爷爷是华人,所以他常常说华语。(Because grandpa is ethnic Chinese, he often speaks Mandarin.)
他们一边包粽子,一边谈论中华文化。(They wrap rice dumplings while talking about Chinese culture.)
华语不但好听,而且很有意思。(The Chinese language is not only pleasant to listen to, but also very interesting.)

p3-12.definition-english: To celebrate a happy or important occasion.
p3-12.sentence: 我们一起庆祝国庆节。(We celebrate National Day together.)
complex: 虽然下雨了,但是国庆庆典还是照常举行。(Although it rained, the National Day celebration still went ahead as usual.)
因为今天是国庆节,所以大家都在庆祝。(Because today is National Day, everyone is celebrating.)
我们一边挥动国旗,一边庆祝国庆节。(We wave the national flag while celebrating National Day.)

p3-12.definition-english: A finger; to point at something.
p3-12.sentence: 他用手指着国旗,骄傲地笑了。(He pointed at the national flag and smiled proudly.)
complex: 虽然他的手指很小,但是弹钢琴弹得很好。(Although his fingers are small, he plays the piano very well.)
因为她找不到路,所以路人用手指着方向。(Because she couldn't find the way, a passerby pointed the direction with their finger.)
这枚戒指不但漂亮,而且很珍贵。(This ring is not only beautiful, but also very precious.)

words: 转弯 (zhuǎn wān, turn a corner)
p3-12.definition-english: Bent or curved; not straight.
p3-12.sentence: 河水弯弯曲曲地流向大海。(The river winds and bends its way to the sea.)
complex: 虽然这条路弯弯曲曲,但是风景很美。(Although this road is very winding, the scenery is beautiful.)
爷爷一边散步,一边弯腰捡起地上的垃圾。(Grandpa bends down to pick up litter off the ground while taking a walk.)
这条河不但弯曲,而且水流很急。(This river is not only winding, but also has a fast current.)

words: 一座山 (yí zuò shān, one mountain)
p3-12.definition-english: A seat; a measure word used for mountains, buildings, or bridges.
p3-12.sentence: 请大家回到自己的座位坐好。(Please everyone return to your own seat and sit down.)
complex: 因为教室里人很多,所以我很快找到自己的座位坐下。(Because there were many people in the classroom, I quickly found my seat and sat down.)
他一边找座位,一边和朋友打招呼。(He looks for a seat while greeting his friends.)
这座山不但很高,而且风景优美。(This mountain is not only tall, but also has beautiful scenery.)

p3-12.definition-english: To sing.
p3-12.sentence: 国庆节那天,我们一起唱歌庆祝。(On National Day, we sing together to celebrate.)
complex: 虽然她唱歌唱得不太好,但是她很喜欢唱。(Although she doesn't sing very well, she loves to sing.)
因为大家很开心,所以一起唱起歌来。(Because everyone was happy, they started singing together.)
我们一边拍手,一边唱歌。(We clap our hands while singing.)

p3-12.definition-english: A song.
p3-12.sentence: 升旗的时候,大家一起唱国歌。(While the flag is being raised, everyone sings the national anthem together.)
complex: 虽然这首歌很难唱,但是我们还是学会了。(Although this song is difficult to sing, we still learned it.)
因为升旗仪式开始了,所以大家一起唱起国歌。(Because the flag-raising ceremony began, everyone sang the national anthem together.)
这首歌曲不但好听,而且很容易记住。(This song is not only nice to listen to, but also easy to remember.)

words: 张贴 (zhāng tiē, to put up/post)
p3-12.definition-english: To stick, paste, or affix something onto a surface.
p3-12.sentence: 我们把画好的国旗贴在墙上。(We stuck the flag we drew onto the wall.)
complex: 虽然贴纸很小,但是我贴了满满一页。(Although the stickers are small, I stuck a whole page full of them.)
他一边涂胶水,一边把图片贴在本子上。(He applies glue while sticking the picture onto the notebook.)
这张海报不但颜色鲜艳,而且贴得很整齐。(This poster is not only brightly colored, but also stuck up very neatly.)

words: 饲养 (sì yǎng, to raise animals)
养鱼 (yǎng yú, to raise fish)
p3-13.definition-english: To raise, rear, or take care of animals or plants.
p3-13.sentence: 爷爷在湖边养虾,每天都去看看。(Grandpa raises prawns by the lake and goes to check on them every day.)
complex: 虽然养虾很辛苦,但是爷爷每天都很开心。(Although raising prawns is hard work, grandpa is happy every day.)
因为哥哥喜欢养鱼,所以他每天都去喂鱼。(Because older brother likes raising fish, he goes to feed them every day.)
妹妹不但会养花,而且还会养小动物。(My younger sister not only can grow flowers, but can also raise small animals.)

p3-13.definition-english: A small aquatic animal with a long body and many legs, often eaten as food.
p3-13.sentence: 他们家养虾,虾长得又大又肥。(Their family raises prawns, and the prawns grow big and plump.)
complex: 虽然虾很小,但是味道很鲜美。(Although prawns are small, they taste very delicious.)
妈妈一边煮虾,一边准备其他菜。(Mom cooked prawns while preparing other dishes at the same time.)
这道虾料理不但好吃,而且很营养。(This prawn dish is not only delicious, but also nutritious.)

p3-13.definition-english: A large body of water surrounded by land.
p3-13.sentence: 我们沿着湖边散步,看到很多小鱼。(We walked along the lakeside and saw many little fish.)
complex: 因为湖水很清澈,所以我们可以看到小鱼。(Because the lake water is very clear, we can see the little fish.)
他们一边坐在湖边,一边聊天。(They sat by the lake while chatting.)
这个湖不但美丽,而且很安静。(This lake is not only beautiful, but also very quiet.)

p3-13.definition-english: A small wild animal with a pointed nose and bushy tail, often described as cunning.
p3-13.sentence: 森林里住着一只聪明的狐狸。(A clever fox lives in the forest.)
complex: 虽然狐狸很聪明,但是它还是被猎人发现了。(Although the fox is clever, it was still discovered by the hunter.)
因为森林里出现了一只白狐,所以大家都很惊讶。(Because a white fox appeared in the forest, everyone was very surprised.)
狐狸一边走路,一边东张西望。(The fox walked while looking around.)

p3-13.english: a fox-like or cat-like wild animal (as in 狐狸)
words: 果子狸 (guǒ zi lí, masked palm civet)
p3-13.definition-english: Used mainly in the word 狐狸 (fox); also refers to civet-like animals.
p3-13.sentence: 狐狸和狸猫都是森林里常见的动物。(Foxes and civet cats are both common animals in the forest.)
complex: 虽然狸猫的样子像猫,但是它其实不是猫。(Although the civet cat looks like a cat, it is actually not a cat.)
因为狐狸和狸猫长得有点像,所以小朋友常常认错。(Because foxes and civet cats look somewhat alike, children often mistake them.)
果子狸不但会爬树,而且喜欢吃水果。(The masked palm civet can not only climb trees, but also likes to eat fruit.)

words: 大灰狼 (dà huī láng, big bad wolf)
狼狈 (láng bèi, in a difficult situation)
p3-13.definition-english: A wild animal similar to a dog, known for hunting in packs.
p3-13.sentence: 湖边突然出现了一只狼,大家都吓了一跳。(A wolf suddenly appeared by the lake, and everyone was startled.)
complex: 虽然狼群很凶猛,但是它们不会随便攻击人。(Although the wolf pack is fierce, they won't attack people casually.)
狼一边低声叫,一边慢慢靠近。(The wolf growled softly while slowly approaching.)
大灰狼不但跑得快,而且很会捕猎。(The big bad wolf can not only run fast, but is also good at hunting.)

p3-13.definition-english: Used mainly in 猩猩, referring to apes such as orangutans and chimpanzees.
p3-13.sentence: 动物园里的猩猩很喜欢爬树。(The orangutan at the zoo loves climbing trees.)
complex: 因为猩猩很聪明,所以它很快就学会了开门。(Because the orangutan is very smart, it quickly learned to open the door.)
猩猩一边吃香蕉,一边看着游客。(The orangutan ate bananas while watching the visitors.)
黑猩猩不但聪明,而且很会模仿人类的动作。(Chimpanzees are not only smart, but also good at imitating human actions.)

words: 沿岸 (yán àn, along the bank)
沿路 (yán lù, along the way)
p3-13.definition-english: Along, alongside, or following the edge of something.
p3-13.sentence: 我们沿着沙滩走,一路上拍了很多照片。(We walked along the beach, taking many photos along the way.)
complex: 虽然沿着湖边走比较远,但是风景很美。(Although walking along the lake is quite far, the scenery is beautiful.)
因为沿岸种了很多树,所以空气很新鲜。(Because many trees are planted along the bank, the air is very fresh.)
我们一边沿着小路走,一边欣赏风景。(We walked along the path while admiring the scenery.)

p3-13.definition-english: A flat stretch of sand or land beside water, such as a beach.
p3-13.sentence: 小朋友们在沙滩上快乐地奔跑。(The children happily ran on the beach.)
complex: 虽然沙滩上很晒,但是小朋友们还是玩得很开心。(Although the beach is very hot in the sun, the children still had a great time playing.)
因为海滩上的浪很大,所以我们没有下水游泳。(Because the waves at the beach were big, we didn't swim in the water.)
这片沙滩不但干净,而且很宽阔。(This beach is not only clean, but also very spacious.)

p3-13.english: to seal, close; measure word for letters
words: 封闭 (fēng bì, to seal, close off)
封面 (fēng miàn, cover of a book)
p3-13.definition-english: To seal or close something; also a measure word for letters.
p3-13.sentence: 他把信放进信封,封好后寄了出去。(He put the letter into the envelope, sealed it, and sent it off.)
complex: 虽然信封破了一个小洞,但是信还是安全送到了。(Although the envelope had a small hole, the letter still arrived safely.)
姐姐一边写信,一边找信封。(Older sister wrote the letter while looking for an envelope.)
这本书的封面不但好看,而且设计特别。(This book's cover is not only nice-looking, but also has a special design.)

p3-13.definition-english: Must; necessarily; certainly.
p3-13.sentence: 过桥的时候,我们必须小心。(When crossing the bridge, we must be careful.)
complex: 因为下雨了,所以我们必须带伞。(Because it's raining, we must bring an umbrella.)
老师一边讲课,一边提醒我们必须专心。(The teacher taught the lesson while reminding us that we must concentrate.)
这件事不但必要,而且十分紧急。(This matter is not only necessary, but also very urgent.)

p3-13.definition-english: Must, have to; also refers to whiskers or a beard.
p3-13.sentence: 过山洞前,我们必须先讨论安全问题。(Before entering the cave, we must first discuss safety issues.)
complex: 虽然天气很冷,但是我们必须出门上学。(Although the weather is cold, we must go out to school.)
因为爷爷的胡须很长,所以他每天都要修剪。(Because grandpa's beard is long, he has to trim it every day.)
爸爸一边刮胡须,一边听新闻。(Dad shaved his beard while listening to the news.)

words: 无论 (wú lùn, no matter what)
p3-13.definition-english: To discuss, talk over, or a theory or opinion about something.
p3-13.sentence: 大家坐在桥边讨论去哪里拍照。(Everyone sat by the bridge discussing where to take photos.)
complex: 虽然我们讨论了很久,但是还没有得出结论。(Although we discussed for a long time, we still haven't reached a conclusion.)
因为问题比较难,所以同学们认真讨论。(Because the problem was rather difficult, the classmates discussed it carefully.)
这场讨论不但有趣,而且让我们学到很多。(This discussion was not only interesting, but also taught us a lot.)

words: 领导 (lǐng dǎo, leader, to lead)
p3-13.definition-english: To lead or guide; also refers to the collar of clothing.
p3-13.sentence: 猩猩带领大家沿着小路走进森林。(The orangutan led everyone along the path into the forest.)
complex: 虽然路很难走,但是队长仍然带领大家前进。(Although the road was difficult, the team leader still led everyone forward.)
老师一边带领学生走,一边讲解森林里的植物。(The teacher led the students along while explaining the plants in the forest.)
这位领导不但认真,而且很关心大家。(This leader is not only serious, but also cares a lot about everyone.)

words: 务必 (wù bì, must, be sure to)
p3-13.definition-english: A task, duty, or job; also relates to providing service.
p3-13.sentence: 这次的任务是拍照记录湖边的动物。(This task is to take photos to record the animals by the lake.)
complex: 因为这次任务很重要,所以大家务必认真完成。(Because this task is very important, everyone must complete it carefully.)
姐姐一边做任务,一边帮忙照顾弟弟。(Older sister worked on the task while helping to look after her younger brother.)
这项任务不但辛苦,而且需要很多时间。(This task is not only tough, but also requires a lot of time.)

p3-13.definition-english: Although; even though.
p3-13.sentence: 狐狸虽然聪明,但还是被大家发现了。(Although the fox was clever, it was still discovered by everyone.)
complex: 虽然今天很累,但是我还是把作业做完了。(Although I was very tired today, I still finished my homework.)
因为"虽然"后面常常要用"但是",所以我们要记住这个句型。(Because "although" is often followed by "but," we need to remember this sentence pattern.)
老师一边写"虽然"这个词,一边说明它的用法。(The teacher wrote the word "although" while explaining how to use it.)

words: 仍旧 (réng jiù, still, as before)
仍需 (réng xū, still need to)
p3-13.definition-english: Still; as before; yet.
p3-13.sentence: 天色虽然暗了,狼群仍然没有离开。(Although the sky had darkened, the wolf pack still hadn't left.)
complex: 虽然已经很晚了,但是他仍然在看书。(Although it was already very late, he was still reading.)
因为雨还没有停,所以我们仍然留在家里。(Because the rain hasn't stopped, we are still staying at home.)
妹妹不但仍然怕黑,而且也怕打雷。(My younger sister not only is still afraid of the dark, but also afraid of thunder.)

p3-13.definition-english: A forest; also describes something dense, dark, or gloomy.
p3-13.sentence: 森林里有一个山洞,里面住着一只狼。(There is a cave in the forest, inhabited by a wolf.)
complex: 虽然森林里很安静,但是有时候也会听到动物的叫声。(Although the forest is very quiet, sometimes you can also hear animal sounds.)
我们一边走进森林,一边观察各种植物。(We walked into the forest while observing various plants.)
这片森林不但很大,而且住着很多动物。(This forest is not only big, but also home to many animals.)

p3-13.definition-english: A cave, hole, or hollow space.
p3-13.sentence: 狐狸躲进了山洞,不敢出来。(The fox hid in the cave and didn't dare to come out.)
complex: 因为山洞里很黑,所以我们带了手电筒。(Because the cave was very dark, we brought a flashlight.)
小狐狸一边走进树洞,一边东张西望。(The little fox walked into the tree hollow while looking around.)
这个洞穴不但很深,而且很潮湿。(This cave is not only deep, but also very damp.)

words: 过桥 (guò qiáo, cross a bridge)
p3-13.definition-english: A structure built over a river, road, or valley for crossing.
p3-13.sentence: 我们走过一座小桥,来到了湖的另一边。(We walked across a small bridge and arrived at the other side of the lake.)
complex: 虽然这座桥很长,但是走起来很安全。(Although this bridge is very long, it is safe to walk across.)
因为桥下的水很深,所以我们过桥的时候特别小心。(Because the water under the bridge is deep, we are extra careful when crossing the bridge.)
他们一边过桥,一边欣赏湖边的风景。(They crossed the bridge while admiring the scenery by the lake.)

p3-13.definition-english: Sand; fine loose grains of rock found on beaches and deserts.
p3-13.sentence: 我们在沙滩上堆了一座沙子做的城堡。(We built a castle out of sand on the beach.)
complex: 虽然沙子很烫,但是小朋友们还是光着脚在玩。(Although the sand was hot, the children still played barefoot.)
因为沙漠里很少下雨,所以那里的植物不多。(Because it rarely rains in the desert, there aren't many plants there.)
这里的沙子不但细腻,而且颜色很白。(The sand here is not only fine, but also very white in colour.)

p3-13.english: to pat, clap; to take a photo
words: 拍照 (pāi zhào, take a photo)
拍打 (pāi dǎ, to pat, beat)
p3-13.definition-english: To pat, clap, or take a photograph.
p3-13.sentence: 大家在桥上拍照,笑得很开心。(Everyone took photos on the bridge, laughing happily.)
complex: 虽然雨下得很大,但是他们还是在桥上拍照。(Although it was raining heavily, they still took photos on the bridge.)
同学们一边拍手,一边唱歌。(The classmates clapped their hands while singing.)
这张照片不但拍得清楚,而且拍得很漂亮。(This photo was not only taken clearly, but also taken beautifully.)

words: 拍照 (pāi zhào, take a photo)
照顾 (zhào gù, to take care of)
p3-13.definition-english: A photograph; to shine light on something; or to take care of someone.
p3-13.sentence: 他把这张照片拍得很漂亮。(He took this photo very beautifully.)
complex: 因为风景很美,所以大家都停下来拍照。(Because the scenery was beautiful, everyone stopped to take photos.)
哥哥一边看照片,一边讲述旅行的故事。(Older brother looked at photos while telling stories about the trip.)
这张照片不但清楚,而且很有意义。(This photo is not only clear, but also meaningful.)

words: 讨教 (tǎo jiào, ask for advice)
p3-13.definition-english: To discuss or talk something over; to ask for or seek something; also to dislike.
p3-13.sentence: 他们讨论了很久,才决定去湖边拍照。(They discussed for a long time before deciding to go take photos by the lake.)
complex: 虽然大家讨论了很久,但是还是没有找到答案。(Although everyone discussed for a long time, they still didn't find the answer.)
因为他很讨厌迟到,所以每天都提早出门。(Because he dislikes being late, he leaves home early every day.)
同学们一边讨论问题,一边做笔记。(The classmates discussed the problem while taking notes.)

words: 漂流 (piāo liú, to drift, float)
p3-13.definition-english: To float or drift on water; also means pretty or beautiful.
p3-13.sentence: 湖面上漂着几片叶子,风景很漂亮。(A few leaves floated on the lake's surface, and the scenery was very pretty.)
complex: 虽然树叶很轻,但是它可以漂浮在水面上。(Although the leaf is light, it can float on the water's surface.)
因为湖水很清澈,所以风景显得特别漂亮。(Because the lake water is very clear, the scenery looks especially pretty.)
这条河不但适合漂流,而且水质很干净。(This river is not only suitable for rafting, but also has very clean water.)

words: 但愿 (dàn yuàn, wish, hope that)
p3-13.definition-english: But; however; used to introduce a contrast.
p3-13.sentence: 狼很凶,但猩猩一点也不怕。(The wolf was fierce, but the orangutan wasn't afraid at all.)
complex: 虽然天气不好,但是我们还是准时出发了。(Although the weather was bad, we still set off on time.)
他一边收拾书包,一边小声说"但愿明天不会下雨"。(He packed his bag while quietly saying, "I hope it won't rain tomorrow.")
他不但功课做得好,而且乐于帮助同学。(He not only does his homework well, but is also happy to help classmates.)

words: 放假 (fàng jià, be on vacation)
p3-14.definition-english: Not real; to pretend; also a holiday or break from school
p3-14.sentence: 他假装生病,想请假不上学。(He pretended to be sick, wanting to take leave from school.)
complex: 因为他不想上学,所以他假装肚子疼。(Because he didn't want to go to school, he pretended his stomach hurt.)
弟弟一边假装睡觉,一边偷看电视。(Younger brother pretended to sleep while secretly watching TV.)
放假的时候,我们不但可以睡懒觉,而且可以去公园玩。(During the holidays, we can not only sleep in, but also go play in the park.)

p3-14.sentence: 大象的力气很强,可以搬动大石头。(The elephant's strength is great; it can move big rocks.)
complex: 虽然他年纪小,但是他的身体很强壮。(Although he is young, his body is very strong.)
她一边流泪,一边坚强地说自己不会放弃。(She cried while strongly saying that she wouldn't give up.)
大象不但身体强壮,而且力气很大。(The elephant is not only physically strong, but also has great strength.)

words: 弱小 (ruò xiǎo, weak and small)
p3-14.sentence: 小猫生病了,身体变得很弱。(The kitten got sick and became very weak.)
complex: 虽然小猫身体弱小,但是它很勇敢。(Although the kitten is small and weak, it is very brave.)
因为他生病了,所以他的身体变得很虚弱。(Because he was sick, his body became very weak.)
他不但身体虚弱,而且经常感冒。(He is not only physically weak, but also often catches colds.)

words: 狼吞虎咽 (láng tūn hǔ yàn, wolf down food)
p3-14.definition-english: To swallow, especially quickly or whole
p3-14.sentence: 熊懒洋洋地把鱼一口吞了下去。(The bear lazily swallowed the fish in one gulp.)
complex: 虽然鱼刺很多,但是熊还是把整条鱼吞了下去。(Although the fish had many bones, the bear still swallowed the whole fish.)
因为他太饿了,所以他狼吞虎咽地吃完了饭。(Because he was too hungry, he wolfed down his meal.)
他一边看电视,一边狼吞虎咽地吃东西。(He watched TV while wolfing down his food.)

p3-14.sentence: 他做事总是慢吞吞的,一点也不着急。(He always does things slowly, not in a hurry at all.)
complex: 因为路很滑,所以他走得很慢。(Because the road was slippery, he walked very slowly.)
奶奶一边慢慢地走路,一边欣赏公园的风景。(Grandma walked slowly while admiring the park scenery.)
他做作业不但很慢,而且常常写错字。(He is not only slow at doing homework, but also often writes wrong characters.)

p3-14.definition-english: Lazy; unwilling to work or move
p3-14.sentence: 那只熊很懒惰,整天只想睡觉。(That bear is very lazy; it only wants to sleep all day.)
complex: 虽然那只熊很懒惰,但是它找食物的时候动作很快。(Although that bear is very lazy, it moves quickly when looking for food.)
弟弟一边偷懒,一边看漫画书。(Younger brother slacks off while reading comic books.)
他不但很懒惰,而且经常迟到。(He is not only lazy, but also often late.)

p3-14.sentence: 这道汤有点咸,我们再加些水吧。(This soup is a bit salty; let's add some water.)
complex: 虽然这道菜有点咸,但是味道还是很好。(Although this dish is a bit salty, it still tastes good.)
因为汤太咸了,所以妈妈又加了一些水。(Because the soup was too salty, Mom added some more water.)
这条咸鱼不但很咸,而且很香。(This salted fish is not only salty, but also fragrant.)

p3-14.definition-english: Bland or light in taste; weak in strength or color
p3-14.sentence: 妈妈煮的粥味道很淡,很适合生病的人吃。(The porridge Mom cooked tastes very bland, suitable for someone who is sick.)
complex: 虽然这碗粥味道很淡,但是它很适合生病的人吃。(Although this bowl of porridge tastes very bland, it's suitable for sick people to eat.)
因为医生说要吃清淡的食物,所以妈妈煮的菜味道很淡。(Because the doctor said to eat light food, the dishes Mom cooked taste very bland.)
他一边喝着清淡的汤,一边休息。(He drank the light soup while resting.)

words: 滑倒 (huá dǎo, slip and fall)
p3-14.sentence: 地板很滑,小心不要滑倒。(The floor is very slippery; be careful not to slip and fall.)
complex: 因为地板很滑,所以他不小心滑倒了。(Because the floor was slippery, he accidentally slipped and fell.)
孩子们一边排队,一边等着玩滑梯。(The children lined up while waiting to play on the slide.)
这条滑梯不但很滑,而且很长。(This slide is not only smooth, but also very long.)

p3-14.sentence: 灰熊的毛是灰褐色的,力气很大。(The grizzly bear's fur is greyish-brown, and it is very strong.)
complex: 虽然灰熊看起来很凶,但是它其实很怕人。(Although the grizzly bear looks fierce, it's actually afraid of people.)
妹妹一边听音乐,一边擦掉桌上的灰尘。(Little sister listened to music while wiping the dust off the table.)
这只灰熊不但力气很大,而且很聪明。(This grizzly bear is not only very strong, but also very smart.)

words: 散步 (sàn bù, take a walk)
p3-14.definition-english: To scatter or break up; loose and disorderly
p3-14.sentence: 熊把玩具弄得到处都是,房间变得很散乱。(The bear scattered the toys everywhere, and the room became very messy.)
complex: 虽然下着小雨,但是爷爷还是出去散步。(Although it was drizzling, Grandpa still went out for a walk.)
因为风很大,所以桌上的纸张都被吹散了。(Because the wind was strong, the papers on the table were all blown scattered.)
这个盒子不但很松散,而且容易破。(This box is not only loose, but also easily broken.)

words: 耍赖 (shuǎ lài, act unreasonably, whine)
耍脾气 (shuǎ pí qi, throw a tantrum)
p3-14.definition-english: To play; to fool around; to act unreasonably
p3-14.sentence: 弟弟输了棋就耍赖,不肯认输。(My younger brother acted unreasonably when he lost the chess game and refused to admit defeat.)
complex: 虽然弟弟输了棋,但是他还是耍赖不肯认输。(Although younger brother lost the chess game, he still acted unreasonably and refused to admit defeat.)
因为妹妹不想睡觉,所以她开始耍脾气。(Because little sister didn't want to sleep, she started throwing a tantrum.)
孩子们一边玩耍,一边大声笑。(The children played while laughing loudly.)

words: 笨重 (bèn zhòng, clumsy and heavy)
p3-14.sentence: 熊的身体笨重,跑起来一点也不快。(The bear's body is clumsy and heavy; it doesn't run fast at all.)
complex: 因为熊的身体很笨重,所以它跑得不快。(Because the bear's body is clumsy and heavy, it doesn't run fast.)
他一边搬着笨重的箱子,一边喘气。(He carried the clumsy heavy box while panting.)
他做事不但很笨拙,而且总是很慢。(He is not only clumsy when doing things, but also always slow.)

words: 滚开 (gǔn kāi, go away, roll away)
p3-14.definition-english: To roll; to turn over and over
p3-14.sentence: 小熊喜欢在草地上打滚。(The little bear likes to roll around on the grass.)
complex: 虽然草地上有点湿,但是小熊还是喜欢在上面打滚。(Although the grass was a bit wet, the little bear still liked to roll around on it.)
小狗一边打滚,一边发出开心的叫声。(The puppy rolled around while making happy barking sounds.)
这个球不但滚得快,而且滚得很远。(This ball not only rolls fast, but also rolls very far.)

words: 撕咬 (sī yǎo, bite and tear)
p3-14.definition-english: To bite; to clamp down with teeth
p3-14.sentence: 小狗生气的时候会咬人,要小心。(The puppy may bite people when it's angry, so be careful.)
complex: 虽然这只小狗看起来很可爱,但是它有时候会咬人。(Although this puppy looks cute, it sometimes bites people.)
因为小狗很害怕,所以它咬伤了那个人。(Because the puppy was scared, it bit and injured that person.)
这只狗不但爱咬人,而且脾气很坏。(This dog not only likes to bite people, but also has a bad temper.)

words: 能够 (néng gòu, be able to)
p3-14.definition-english: Enough; sufficient; to be able to
p3-14.sentence: 我吃饱了,不能再吃了,已经够了。(I'm full and can't eat anymore, it's already enough.)
complex: 虽然我很饿,但是这些食物已经够了。(Although I'm hungry, this food is already enough.)
因为时间不够,所以我们没有做完功课。(Because there wasn't enough time, we didn't finish our homework.)
他一边数硬币,一边想着钱够不够买玩具。(He counted the coins while wondering if he had enough money to buy the toy.)

p3-14.sentence: 熊吃饱了以后就躺在地上睡觉。(After the bear ate its fill, it lay down on the ground to sleep.)
complex: 因为他很累了,所以他躺下就睡着了。(Because he was very tired, he fell asleep as soon as he lay down.)
弟弟喜欢一边躺着,一边看故事书。(Younger brother likes to lie down while reading storybooks.)
他不但喜欢躺着看书,而且常常躺着睡着了。(He not only likes lying down reading, but also often falls asleep lying down.)

p3-14.sentence: 这块石头非常硬,敲不碎。(This stone is extremely hard; it can't be broken by knocking.)
complex: 虽然这块石头看起来不大,但是它非常硬。(Although this stone doesn't look big, it is extremely hard.)
他一边听故事,一边把硬币放进储蓄罐里。(He listened to a story while putting coins into the piggy bank.)
这块木头不但很硬,而且很重。(This piece of wood is not only very hard, but also very heavy.)

words: 软绵绵 (ruǎn mián mián, soft and squishy)
p3-14.sentence: 这个枕头摸起来软绵绵的,很舒服。(This pillow feels soft and squishy; it's very comfortable.)
complex: 虽然这个枕头看起来很普通,但是它摸起来软绵绵的。(Although this pillow looks ordinary, it feels soft and squishy.)
因为面包放了很多天,所以它变得不再柔软。(Because the bread had been left for many days, it was no longer soft.)
这只玩具熊不但很柔软,而且很可爱。(This teddy bear is not only soft, but also very cute.)

p3-14.definition-english: Bitter in taste; hard, difficult, or full of suffering
p3-14.sentence: 这种药很苦,但是可以治病。(This medicine is very bitter, but it can cure illness.)
complex: 虽然苦瓜很苦,但是它对身体很好。(Although bitter gourd is bitter, it's good for the body.)
因为这种药很苦,所以妹妹不愿意吃。(Because this medicine is very bitter, little sister doesn't want to take it.)
他一边皱眉,一边吃下苦苦的药。(He frowned while swallowing the bitter medicine.)

words: 多嘴 (duō zuǐ, talk too much, nosy)
p3-14.sentence: 熊张开大嘴,一口把鱼吞了下去。(The bear opened its big mouth and swallowed the fish in one gulp.)
complex: 因为鱼刺卡在喉咙里,所以医生让他张嘴检查。(Because the fish bone got stuck in his throat, the doctor asked him to open his mouth to check.)
熊一边张开嘴巴,一边发出低吼声。(The bear opened its mouth while growling.)
妹妹不但爱多嘴,而且说话很快。(Little sister not only likes to talk too much, but also speaks very quickly.)

words: 饿肚子 (è dù zi, have an empty stomach)
p3-14.sentence: 我肚子饿了,想吃点东西。(My stomach is hungry, I want to eat something.)
complex: 虽然已经很晚了,但是他还是觉得肚子饿。(Although it was already late, he still felt hungry.)
他一边写功课,一边喊肚子饿。(He did his homework while complaining that he was hungry.)
他不但肚子饿了,而且觉得很累。(He is not only hungry, but also feels tired.)

words: 吃饱 (chī bǎo, eat until full)
温饱 (wēn bǎo, adequately fed and clothed)
p3-14.sentence: 我已经吃饱了,不能再吃了。(I'm already full and can't eat anymore.)
complex: 虽然食物很多,但是我已经吃饱了。(Although there was a lot of food, I'm already full.)
因为他吃了三碗饭,所以他的肚子饱饱的。(Because he ate three bowls of rice, his stomach is very full.)
弟弟不但吃饱了,而且还想睡觉。(Younger brother is not only full, but also wants to sleep.)

p3-14.definition-english: A bear; also used to describe someone clumsy or foolish
p3-14.sentence: 那只笨熊懒洋洋地躺在树荫下睡觉。(That clumsy bear lay lazily under the tree shade, sleeping.)
complex: 虽然熊猫看起来很温和,但是它的力气其实很大。(Although the panda looks gentle, its strength is actually very great.)
因为天气变冷了,所以熊开始准备冬眠。(Because the weather turned cold, the bear began to prepare for hibernation.)
小熊一边散步,一边寻找食物。(The little bear walked while looking for food.)

p3-14.definition-english: Interesting; fun; a feeling of interest
p3-14.sentence: 我觉得观察小熊的生活习惯很有趣。(I find observing the bear's living habits very interesting.)
complex: 因为这本书很有趣,所以我一口气看完了。(Because this book is very interesting, I finished it in one sitting.)
我们一边参观动物园,一边讨论有趣的动物知识。(We visited the zoo while discussing interesting animal facts.)
这个游戏不但很有趣,而且能学到知识。(This game is not only interesting, but also lets you learn knowledge.)

p3-15.definition-english: To take something secretly without permission, or to do something quietly without being noticed.
p3-15.sentence: 他趁没人的时候,偷偷地拿走了一块饼干。(He secretly took a biscuit when no one was around.)
complex: 虽然他很饿,但是他没有偷拿同学的面包。(Although he was very hungry, he did not steal his classmate's bread.)
因为门没有关好,所以小偷偷偷地溜了进来。(Because the door wasn't closed properly, the thief sneaked in quietly.)
他一边写作业,一边偷偷地看漫画书。(While doing his homework, he secretly peeked at a comic book.)

words: 吓一跳 (xià yī tiào, be startled)
p3-15.definition-english: To frighten or scare someone.
p3-15.sentence: 那只黑猫突然跳出来,吓了他一跳。(The black cat suddenly jumped out and gave him a fright.)
complex: 虽然那部电影很吓人,但是他还是想看。(Although that movie was very scary, he still wanted to watch it.)
因为一只老鼠突然跑出来,所以她吓了一跳。(Because a mouse suddenly ran out, she was given a fright.)
那个鬼故事不但吓人,而且非常有趣。(That ghost story is not only scary, but also very interesting.)

p3-15.definition-english: To run away or escape from danger or trouble.
p3-15.sentence: 小偷看到警察,就马上逃跑了。(The thief ran away as soon as he saw the police.)
complex: 虽然他很害怕,但是他没有逃跑。(Although he was very scared, he did not run away.)
小猫一边逃跑,一边回头看那只狗。(The kitten ran away while looking back at the dog.)
他不但逃学,而且还骗妈妈说去了学校。(He not only skipped school, but also lied to his mother that he went to school.)

p3-15.definition-english: A feeling of physical or emotional pain.
p3-15.sentence: 他不小心摔倒了,膝盖很痛。(He accidentally fell down, and his knee hurt a lot.)
complex: 因为他打球的时候不小心撞到了桌子,所以手臂很痛。(Because he accidentally bumped into the table while playing ball, his arm hurt a lot.)
妹妹一边哭,一边说肚子很痛。(My little sister cried while saying her stomach hurt.)
他的头不但很痛,而且还有点发烧。(His head not only hurt a lot, but he also had a slight fever.)

words: 冒险 (mào xiǎn, take a risk)
感冒 (gǎn mào, catch a cold)
p3-15.definition-english: To emerge or rise up suddenly, or to take a risk despite danger.
p3-15.sentence: 他决定冒险爬进那个黑黑的洞里。(He decided to take a risk and climb into the dark hole.)
complex: 虽然外面风很大,但是他还是冒险出去找小狗。(Although it was very windy outside, he still took the risk to go out and find his puppy.)
因为他没有多穿衣服,所以感冒了。(Because he didn't wear enough clothes, he caught a cold.)
他一边咳嗽,一边说自己感冒了。(He coughed while saying he had caught a cold.)

p3-15.definition-english: To shake or tremble, usually from fear or cold.
p3-15.sentence: 他吓得全身发抖。(He was so scared that his whole body trembled.)
complex: 虽然天气不算很冷,但是他还是冷得发抖。(Although the weather wasn't that cold, he still shivered from the cold.)
因为他没有穿外套,所以冷得发抖。(Because he didn't wear a jacket, he trembled from the cold.)
他不但害怕得发抖,而且说不出话来。(He not only trembled with fear, but also couldn't speak.)

p3-15.definition-english: To have the courage to do something.
p3-15.sentence: 他很勇敢,敢一个人走进黑暗的教室。(He was very brave and dared to walk into the dark classroom alone.)
complex: 虽然那条路很暗,但是他还是敢一个人走回家。(Although that road was very dark, he still dared to walk home alone.)
他一边发抖,一边勇敢地举手回答问题。(He trembled while bravely raising his hand to answer the question.)
他不但很勇敢,而且敢于承认自己的错误。(He is not only very brave, but also dares to admit his own mistakes.)

words: 钻洞 (zuān dòng, drill/bore a hole)
p3-15.definition-english: To bore or drill into something (zuān), or a diamond/drilling tool (zuàn).
p3-15.sentence: 老鼠在墙角钻了一个洞。(The mouse drilled a hole in the corner of the wall.)
complex: 因为地上有个小洞,所以蚂蚁一只一只地钻了进去。(Because there was a small hole in the ground, the ants drilled in one by one.)
他一边钻研数学题,一边做笔记。(He studied the math problem intensively while taking notes.)
这颗钻石不但漂亮,而且非常珍贵。(This diamond is not only beautiful, but also very precious.)

words: 怀里 (huái lǐ, in one's arms)
p3-15.definition-english: To cherish or miss someone or something, or one's chest/embrace.
p3-15.sentence: 奶奶把小猫抱在怀里。(Grandma held the kitten in her arms.)
complex: 虽然搬家了,但是他还是很怀念以前的老师。(Although he moved house, he still misses his former teacher very much.)
因为下雨了,所以他把小狗抱在怀里。(Because it was raining, he held the puppy in his arms.)
老师一边上课,一边关怀生病的同学。(The teacher taught the class while caring for the sick student.)

words: 朱先生 (zhū xiān shēng, Mr. Zhu)
p3-15.definition-english: A Chinese surname; also a bright red (vermillion) colour.
p3-15.sentence: 班里有个同学姓朱,大家都叫他小朱。(There's a classmate in the class surnamed Zhu, and everyone calls him Little Zhu.)
complex: 虽然朱先生很忙,但是他还是来参加了活动。(Although Mr. Zhu was very busy, he still came to attend the event.)
因为新来的老师姓朱,所以同学们都叫他朱老师。(Because the new teacher's surname is Zhu, the students all call him Teacher Zhu.)
这幅画不但用了朱红色,而且看起来很鲜艳。(This painting not only used vermillion red, but also looks very vibrant.)

words: 简笔画 (jiǎn bǐ huà, simple line drawing)
p3-15.definition-english: Simple, easy, or not complicated.
p3-15.sentence: 这道数学题很简单,他一下子就做完了。(This math question was very simple, and he finished it right away.)
complex: 虽然这道题看起来很难,但是其实做法很简单。(Although this question looks difficult, the method is actually very simple.)
老师一边讲课,一边在黑板上画简笔画。(The teacher taught the lesson while drawing simple line drawings on the blackboard.)
这篇作文不但简短,而且写得很清楚。(This composition is not only brief, but also written very clearly.)

p3-15.definition-english: Relating to comics or cartoons, or to wander freely without a fixed plan.
p3-15.sentence: 他最喜欢在课余时间看漫画。(He loves reading comics in his free time.)
complex: 因为他很喜欢动漫,所以每天都看漫画。(Because he really likes anime, he reads comics every day.)
爷爷一边漫步,一边给他讲以前的故事。(Grandpa strolled while telling him stories from the past.)
这本漫画书不但有趣,而且画得很好看。(This comic book is not only interesting, but also beautifully drawn.)

words: 忍不住 (rěn bú zhù, can't help)
p3-15.definition-english: To endure or hold back a feeling or urge.
p3-15.sentence: 他疼得忍不住叫了出来。(He was in so much pain that he couldn't help crying out.)
complex: 虽然他很想笑,但是还是忍住了。(Although he really wanted to laugh, he still held it back.)
因为伤口很疼,所以他忍不住流下了眼泪。(Because the wound hurt a lot, he couldn't help shedding tears.)
他一边忍着疼痛,一边慢慢地走回教室。(He endured the pain while slowly walking back to the classroom.)

words: 哈哈 (hā hā, sound of laughter)
哈气 (hā qì, breathe out, pant)
p3-15.definition-english: An exclamation imitating the sound of laughter.
p3-15.sentence: 看到滑稽的漫画,大家都哈哈大笑起来。(Seeing the funny comic, everyone burst into laughter.)
complex: 虽然这个笑话不太好笑,但是大家还是哈哈大笑起来。(Although the joke wasn't very funny, everyone still burst into laughter.)
因为弟弟做了一个鬼脸,所以大家都哈哈大笑。(Because little brother made a funny face, everyone burst into laughter.)
他讲的笑话不但好笑,而且总是让大家哈哈大笑。(The jokes he tells are not only funny, but also always make everyone laugh heartily.)

p3-15.english: oh, exclamation of surprise or regret
words: 哎呀 (āi yā, oh no, oops)
哎哟 (āi yō, ouch, oh dear)
哎呀呀 (āi yā ya, oh dear, emphatic)
p3-15.definition-english: An exclamation expressing surprise, regret, or mild pain.
p3-15.sentence: 哎,我忘记带课本了!(Oh no, I forgot to bring my textbook!)
complex: 虽然妈妈提醒他小心,但是他还是摔了一跤,哎哟地叫了一声。(Although mom reminded him to be careful, he still fell down and cried out in pain.)
他一边找铅笔,一边哎呀地叫。(He looked for his pencil while exclaiming in dismay.)
他不但忘了带课本,而且还哎呀地叫了起来。(He not only forgot to bring his textbook, but also exclaimed in dismay.)

p3-15.definition-english: An exclamatory particle expressing surprise, or used at the end of a sentence for emphasis.
p3-15.sentence: 这幅漫画真有趣呀!(This comic is really funny!)
complex: 因为漫画太好笑了,所以他高兴地说好呀。(Because the comic was so funny, he happily said yes.)
他一边点头,一边说是呀。(He nodded while saying yes indeed.)
这个故事不但精彩,而且好看极了呀!(This story is not only wonderful, but also extremely enjoyable!)

p3-15.definition-english: A room, especially an indoor space used for a specific purpose.
p3-15.sentence: 上课铃响了,同学们都跑回教室。(The bell rang, and the students all ran back to the classroom.)
complex: 虽然外面在下雨,但是教室里很温暖。(Although it was raining outside, the classroom was very warm.)
因为很快就要上课了,所以同学们都跑回教室。(Because class was about to start soon, the students all ran back to the classroom.)
老师一边走进教室,一边跟同学们打招呼。(The teacher walked into the classroom while greeting the students.)

words: 上班 (shàng bān, go to work)
p3-15.definition-english: A class or group of students, or one's shift at work.
p3-15.sentence: 我们班的同学都喜欢看漫画书。(The students in our class all like reading comic books.)
complex: 虽然他们不同班,但是他们还是最好的朋友。(Although they are not in the same class, they are still best friends.)
因为爸爸要上班,所以很早就出门了。(Because dad had to go to work, he left home very early.)
我们班不但成绩好,而且很团结。(Our class not only has good results, but is also very united.)

p3-15.definition-english: Simple, single, or alone; not complicated.
p3-15.sentence: 他单独一个人留在教室里做作业。(He stayed alone in the classroom to do his homework.)
complex: 虽然这道数学题很简单,但是他还是想了很久。(Although this math question was very simple, he still thought about it for a long time.)
他一边听音乐,一边单独在客厅里做手工。(He listened to music while working on crafts alone in the living room.)
这张单人床不但很小,而且非常舒服。(This single bed is not only small, but also very comfortable.)

words: 挖洞 (wā dòng, dig a hole)
挖掘 (wā jué, excavate, dig up)
p3-15.definition-english: To dig or excavate, making a hole in the ground.
p3-15.sentence: 小狗在花园里挖了一个洞。(The puppy dug a hole in the garden.)
complex: 因为他想找到宝藏,所以在沙滩上挖了一个大洞。(Because he wanted to find treasure, he dug a big hole on the beach.)
他一边挖土,一边唱歌。(He dug the earth while singing.)
工人们不但要挖土,而且还要种树。(The workers not only need to dig the earth, but also need to plant trees.)

words: 无论 (wú lùn, no matter, regardless)
p3-16.definition-english: Not having something; without; none.
p3-16.sentence: 传说里,白蛇的法力无穷,谁都比不过她。(In the legend, the white snake's magical power was boundless, no one could compare.)
complex: 因为放假在家没事做,所以妹妹觉得很无聊。(Because she had nothing to do at home during the holidays, younger sister felt very bored.)
哥哥一边做作业,一边说功课好像无穷无尽。(Older brother did his homework while saying the work seemed endless.)
弟弟不但爱看书,而且从来不觉得无聊。(Younger brother not only loves reading, but also never finds it boring.)

words: 始终 (shǐ zhōng, from beginning to end)
终点 (zhōng diǎn, finish line, endpoint)
p3-16.definition-english: The end or final point; at last.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子和许仙终于在西湖边相遇了。(The white snake and Xu Xian finally met by West Lake.)
complex: 虽然路很长,但是他终于跑到了终点。(Although the road was long, he finally reached the finish line.)
他一边跑步一边想着终点在哪里。(He ran while thinking about where the finish line was.)
她不但坚持到最后,而且始终没有放弃。(She not only persisted to the end, but also never gave up from start to finish.)

p3-16.definition-english: A snake, a long limbless reptile.
p3-16.sentence: 传说中,白蛇修炼千年后变成了美丽的姑娘。(According to legend, the white snake, after cultivating for a thousand years, turned into a beautiful young woman.)
complex: 虽然蛇皮摸起来很粗糙,但是蛇的动作十分灵活。(Although snake skin feels rough to the touch, a snake's movements are very agile.)
因为花园里出现了一条毒蛇,所以妈妈叫我们小心。(Because a poisonous snake appeared in the garden, mom told us to be careful.)
这条蛇不但会游泳,而且爬树的速度很快。(This snake can not only swim, but also climbs trees very quickly.)

words: 途中 (tú zhōng, on the way)
p3-16.definition-english: A road or route; the course of a journey.
p3-16.sentence: 他们俩在游西湖的途中认识了彼此。(The two of them got to know each other while touring West Lake.)
complex: 虽然路途遥远,但是他们还是坚持走到底。(Although the journey was long, they still insisted on walking all the way.)
因为天色渐渐暗了下来,所以我们决定在途中休息一下。(Because the sky was gradually getting dark, we decided to rest along the way.)
他们一边走一边讨论着自己的前途。(They walked while discussing their future prospects.)

p3-16.definition-english: Hardworking; diligent; putting in a lot of effort.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子既勤劳又善良,深受大家喜爱。(The white snake was both hardworking and kind, and was deeply loved by everyone.)
complex: 因为他学习很勤奋,所以成绩一直名列前茅。(Because he studies very diligently, his grades are always among the top.)
妈妈一边做饭一边夸奖姐姐做事勤快。(Mom cooked while praising older sister for being hardworking.)
他不但勤劳,而且做事很认真。(He is not only hardworking, but also does things very conscientiously.)

p3-16.english: the two of them, a couple
words: 他们俩 (tā men liǎ, the two of them)
咱俩 (zán liǎ, the two of us)
姐妹俩 (jiě mèi liǎ, the two sisters)
p3-16.definition-english: A colloquial way of saying 'two people', used after a pronoun or noun.
p3-16.sentence: 许仙和白娘子俩一见钟情,很快就相爱了。(Xu Xian and the white snake fell in love at first sight and soon fell for each other.)
complex: 虽然他们俩性格不同,但是感情非常好。(Although the two of them have different personalities, their relationship is very good.)
姐妹俩一边散步,一边开心地聊天。(The two sisters took a walk while happily chatting.)
咱俩不但是同学,而且是最好的朋友。(The two of us are not only classmates, but also best friends.)

p3-16.definition-english: A wheel; to take turns doing something in order.
p3-16.sentence: 他们轮流划船,一起游遍了西湖。(They took turns rowing the boat and toured all around West Lake together.)
complex: 虽然大家都想先玩,但是我们还是决定轮流玩。(Although everyone wanted to play first, we still decided to take turns playing.)
因为车轮坏了,所以爸爸把自行车送去修理。(Because the wheel was broken, dad sent the bicycle for repair.)
这艘轮船不但很大,而且开得很稳。(This steamship is not only big, but also sails very steadily.)

p3-16.definition-english: To catch fish using a hook and line.
p3-16.sentence: 老爷爷每天早上都在湖边钓鱼。(Grandpa goes fishing by the lake every morning.)
complex: 虽然今天没有钓到鱼,但是爷爷还是很开心。(Although he didn't catch any fish today, grandpa was still very happy.)
因为爷爷忘了带钓竿,所以我们只好回家。(Because grandpa forgot to bring the fishing rod, we had to go home.)
爷爷一边钓鱼一边给我们讲故事。(Grandpa fished while telling us stories.)

words: 数一数 (shǔ yi shǔ, to count)
p3-16.definition-english: A number or amount; to count things one by one.
p3-16.sentence: 白蛇传的故事已经流传了数百年。(The story of the Legend of the White Snake has already been passed down for several hundred years.)
complex: 因为数学考试很难,所以他考得不太理想。(Because the math test was difficult, he didn't do as well as expected.)
妹妹一边吃糖果一边数一数还剩下多少颗。(Younger sister ate candy while counting how many were left.)
这批货物不但数量多,而且质量很好。(This batch of goods is not only large in quantity, but also of good quality.)

words: 冷却 (lěng què, to cool down)
却步 (què bù, to hesitate, hold back)
p3-16.definition-english: A word meaning 'but' or 'however', showing a turn in meaning.
p3-16.sentence: 法海和尚想拆散他们,许仙却始终相信白娘子。(Monk Fahai wanted to separate them, but Xu Xian always trusted the white snake.)
complex: 虽然那杯茶已经冷却了,但是喝起来还是很香。(Although the tea had already cooled down, it still tasted fragrant.)
他一边练习一边告诉自己,遇到困难也不能却步。(He practiced while telling himself he mustn't back down even when facing difficulties.)
他不但没有却步,而且更加努力练习。(He not only didn't back down, but also practiced even harder.)

p3-16.english: to miss, to read aloud, to study
words: 想念 (xiǎng niàn, to miss someone)
念书 (niàn shū, to study, read)
念经 (niàn jīng, to chant scriptures)
p3-16.definition-english: To miss someone; to read aloud; to study.
p3-16.sentence: 法海和尚每天都在寺庙里念经。(Monk Fahai chants scriptures in the temple every day.)
complex: 虽然弟弟很想念姐姐,但是他还是忍住没有哭。(Although younger brother missed older sister very much, he still held back and didn't cry.)
因为哥哥每天认真念书,所以成绩进步很快。(Because older brother studies diligently every day, his grades are improving quickly.)
老和尚不但每天念经,而且教导弟子要善良。(The old monk not only chants scriptures every day, but also teaches his disciples to be kind.)

p3-16.english: to pass on, to spread, legend
words: 流传 (liú chuán, to spread, circulate)
p3-16.definition-english: To pass something on; to spread; a legend or tale.
p3-16.sentence: 白蛇传的故事流传至今,大家都爱听。(The story of the Legend of the White Snake has been passed down to this day, and everyone loves hearing it.)
complex: 虽然这个传说很古老,但是到现在还有很多人喜欢听。(Although this legend is very old, many people still enjoy listening to it now.)
因为这个故事很感人,所以一直流传到今天。(Because this story is very touching, it has been passed down to this day.)
奶奶一边包粽子一边讲端午节的传统故事。(Grandma wrapped rice dumplings while telling the traditional story of the Dragon Boat Festival.)

words: 感觉 (gǎn jué, to feel, sense)
p3-16.definition-english: To feel or sense something; an emotion.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子对许仙的感情十分真挚。(The white snake's feelings for Xu Xian were very sincere.)
complex: 因为那部电影很感人,所以我看完后十分感动。(Because the movie was very touching, I felt very moved after watching it.)
他一边听着音乐一边慢慢有了轻松的感觉。(He listened to music while gradually feeling relaxed.)
他们俩不但感情很好,而且互相信任。(The two of them not only have a good relationship, but also trust each other.)

words: 抬头 (tái tóu, raise one's head)
p3-16.definition-english: To lift or raise something up.
p3-16.sentence: 她慢慢抬起头,看见了许仙温柔的笑容。(She slowly raised her head and saw Xu Xian's gentle smile.)
complex: 虽然箱子很重,但是他还是把它抬起来了。(Although the box was heavy, he still lifted it up.)
他一边走路一边抬头看天上的星星。(He walked while raising his head to look at the stars in the sky.)
他不但把桌子抬高了,而且摆放得整整齐齐。(He not only raised the table, but also arranged it neatly.)

p3-16.definition-english: A formal word meaning 'at' or 'in', often used to link ideas together.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子于西湖边等了许仙很久。(The white snake waited for Xu Xian by West Lake for a long time.)
complex: 虽然天气不好,但是他们终于到达了目的地。(Although the weather was bad, they finally arrived at their destination.)
因为这本书是关于恐龙的,所以弟弟看得很入迷。(Because this book is about dinosaurs, younger brother was engrossed reading it.)
他不但每天做功课,而且都会检查一遍,于是成绩越来越好。(He not only does his homework every day, but also checks it over, and as a result his grades keep improving.)

p3-16.definition-english: To dance; a dance performance.
p3-16.sentence: 节日里,村民们在广场上快乐地跳舞。(During the festival, the villagers danced happily in the square.)
complex: 虽然她刚开始学跳舞,但是动作已经很标准了。(Although she just started learning to dance, her movements are already very precise.)
因为今天是庆祝会,所以同学们准备了精彩的舞蹈表演。(Because today is a celebration, classmates prepared a wonderful dance performance.)
她一边在舞台上跳舞,一边对观众微笑。(She danced on stage while smiling at the audience.)

words: 泡水 (pào shuǐ, soak in water)
p3-16.definition-english: A bubble; to soak or steep something in liquid.
p3-16.sentence: 洪水泡了金山寺,法海和白娘子展开了一场大战。(The flood soaked Jinshan Temple, and Fahai and the white snake fought a great battle.)
complex: 因为衣服很脏,所以妈妈把它泡水后再洗。(Because the clothes were very dirty, mom soaked them in water before washing.)
爷爷一边泡茶一边跟我们聊天。(Grandpa brewed tea while chatting with us.)
这些泡泡不但五颜六色,而且飞得很高。(These bubbles are not only colorful, but also fly very high.)

words: 打结 (dǎ jié, tie a knot)
p3-16.definition-english: To tie a knot; an outcome or result.
p3-16.sentence: 许仙和白娘子结婚后,一起开了一家药店。(After Xu Xian and the white snake got married, they opened a medicine shop together.)
complex: 虽然鞋带打结了,但是他很快就把它解开了。(Although the shoelace got knotted, he quickly untied it.)
他一边练习跑步一边期待比赛的结果。(He practiced running while looking forward to the competition results.)
姐姐不但准备结婚了,而且亲手设计了婚礼。(Older sister is not only getting married, but also designed the wedding herself.)

words: 圈子 (quān zi, circle, social group)
圈起来 (quān qǐ lái, to circle, mark)
p3-16.definition-english: A round shape like a ring; to mark something with a circle.
p3-16.sentence: 法海把白娘子困在雷峰塔下的法术圈里。(Fahai trapped the white snake in a magic circle beneath Leifeng Pagoda.)
complex: 虽然那个圆圈画得不太整齐,但是老师还是表扬了他。(Although the circle wasn't drawn very neatly, the teacher still praised him.)
因为答案写错了,所以老师把它圈起来提醒我。(Because the answer was written wrong, the teacher circled it to remind me.)
他不但认识很多朋友,而且交际圈子很广。(He not only knows many friends, but also has a wide social circle.)

words: 认识 (rèn shi, to know, recognize)
p3-16.definition-english: To recognize or be familiar with someone or something; knowledge.
p3-16.sentence: 小青最先认识了许仙,便把他介绍给白娘子。(Xiaoqing was the first to get to know Xu Xian, so she introduced him to the white snake.)
complex: 虽然他们才认识不久,但是已经成了好朋友。(Although they've only known each other for a short while, they've already become good friends.)
因为他读了很多书,所以懂得的知识特别丰富。(Because he has read many books, the knowledge he has is especially rich.)
老师一边写黑板一边教我们生活常识。(The teacher wrote on the board while teaching us everyday common sense.)

p3-16.definition-english: To take the place of something; a generation or era.
p3-16.sentence: 古代流传下来的传说,现代人依然很喜欢。(Legends passed down from ancient times are still loved by people today.)
complex: 因为姐姐生病了,所以妹妹代替她去参加比赛。(Because older sister was sick, younger sister took her place in the competition.)
我们一边参观博物馆一边了解古代的历史。(We visited the museum while learning about ancient history.)
现代科技不但方便,而且发展得很快。(Modern technology is not only convenient, but also develops very quickly.)

p3-16.definition-english: To take the place of someone or something; to substitute.
p3-16.sentence: 小青愿意替白娘子挡下这场劫难。(Xiaoqing was willing to take this disaster in the white snake's place.)
complex: 虽然他很累,但是还是主动代替同学值日。(Although he was very tired, he still voluntarily took his classmate's place on duty.)
姐姐一边收拾房间,一边把坏掉的灯泡替换掉。(Older sister tidied the room while replacing the broken light bulb.)
这个演员不但演技好,而且从不用替身。(This actor not only has good acting skills, but also never uses a stand-in.)

words: 低头 (dī tóu, lower one's head)
高低 (gāo dī, high and low)
p3-16.definition-english: Low in position or level; to lower something.
p3-16.sentence: 白娘子低着头,静静地等待许仙的原谅。(The white snake lowered her head, quietly waiting for Xu Xian's forgiveness.)
complex: 虽然他做错了事,但是他低着头诚恳地道歉。(Although he did something wrong, he lowered his head and apologized sincerely.)
因为山路的高低不平,所以我们走得很小心。(Because the mountain path was uneven, we walked very carefully.)
多喝水不但对身体好,而且能降低生病的机会。(Drinking more water is not only good for your body, but also can lower the chance of getting sick.)

p3-17.definition-english: A person who works the land; relating to farming
p3-17.sentence: 农夫每天在田里辛勤地工作。(The farmer works hard in the fields every day.)
complex: 虽然天气很热,但是农夫还在农田里工作。(Although the weather was very hot, the farmer was still working in the farmland.)
因为农田需要照顾,所以农民每天都很忙。(Because the farmland needs tending, the farmer is busy every day.)
农夫一边浇水一边照顾农田里的蔬菜。(The farmer waters the vegetables while tending to them in the farmland.)

words: 夫妻 (fū qī, husband and wife)
p3-17.definition-english: A man; a husband; a laborer
p3-17.sentence: 妈妈的丈夫是我的爸爸。(Mom's husband is my dad.)
complex: 虽然农夫每天很辛苦,但是他从不抱怨。(Although the farmer works hard every day, he never complains.)
因为丈夫要上班,所以他很早就出门了。(Because the husband has to go to work, he left very early.)
这对夫妻不但互相关心,而且经常一起做家务。(This husband and wife not only care for each other, but also often do housework together.)

words: 劳累 (láo lèi, tired from work)
p3-17.definition-english: Work; labor; toil
p3-17.sentence: 农夫每天辛勤劳动,从不偷懒。(The farmer labors diligently every day and never slacks off.)
complex: 虽然劳动很辛苦,但是农夫觉得很开心。(Although labor is hard, the farmer feels happy.)
工人们一边劳动一边唱歌。(The workers labor while singing.)
他不但每天劳动,而且从不喊累。(He not only labors every day, but also never complains of being tired.)

p3-17.definition-english: Relating to fishing
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫每天划船出海打渔。(The fisherman rows his boat out to sea to fish every day.)
complex: 因为渔夫想抓鱼,所以他每天出海打渔。(Because the fisherman wants to catch fish, he goes out to sea fishing every day.)
渔夫一边划船一边打渔。(The fisherman rows the boat while fishing.)
他不但会打渔,而且很会修理渔船。(He not only knows how to fish, but also knows how to repair fishing boats.)

p3-17.definition-english: An immortal being or deity with magical powers
p3-17.sentence: 故事里的神仙帮助了善良的渔夫。(The immortal in the story helped the kind fisherman.)
complex: 虽然神仙有魔法,但是他很喜欢帮助别人。(Although the immortal has magic, he likes to help others.)
因为仙女很善良,所以大家都喜欢她。(Because the fairy is kind, everyone likes her.)
神仙一边说话一边帮助渔夫。(The immortal talks while helping the fisherman.)

words: 捞鱼 (lāo yú, scoop up fish)
p3-17.definition-english: To scoop or fish something out of water
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫从河里捞起了一条金鱼。(The fisherman scooped a goldfish out of the river.)
complex: 虽然河水很深,但是渔夫还是捞起了金鱼。(Although the river water was deep, the fisherman still scooped up the goldfish.)
因为铁棒掉进了河里,所以渔夫赶紧去打捞。(Because the iron rod fell into the river, the fisherman quickly went to salvage it.)
他不但会捞鱼,而且捞得又快又多。(He not only knows how to scoop up fish, but also does it quickly and abundantly.)

p3-17.definition-english: Spirit; essence; energetic and lively
p3-17.sentence: 河里住着一个神奇的水精灵。(A magical water spirit lived in the river.)
complex: 虽然故事很短,但是内容十分精彩。(Although the story was short, the content was very wonderful.)
小精灵一边跳舞一边唱歌。(The little spirit dances while singing.)
他今天不但精神很好,而且做事很认真。(Today he is not only very energetic, but also does things carefully.)

p3-17.definition-english: Iron, a hard grey metal
p3-17.sentence: 那根铁棒掉进了河里。(That iron rod fell into the river.)
complex: 因为铁棒很重,所以他搬不动。(Because the iron rod is very heavy, he couldn't move it.)
工人一边敲打铁块一边流汗。(The worker hammers the iron block while sweating.)
这块铁不但坚硬,而且很重。(This piece of iron is not only hard, but also very heavy.)

p3-17.definition-english: Silver; relating to money or banking
p3-17.sentence: 铁棒碰到水后竟然变成了银子。(The iron rod, upon touching the water, actually turned into silver.)
complex: 虽然银子很贵重,但是渔夫决定还给神仙。(Although the silver was valuable, the fisherman decided to return it to the immortal.)
因为爸爸要存钱,所以他去了银行。(Because dad wanted to save money, he went to the bank.)
妈妈一边在银行排队一边看手机。(Mom lines up at the bank while looking at her phone.)

words: 门牌 (mén pái, house number plate)
p3-17.definition-english: A sign, plate, or brand
p3-17.sentence: 店门口挂着一块写着字的牌子。(A sign with writing on it hung at the shop entrance.)
complex: 虽然那块牌子很旧,但是上面的字还很清楚。(Although that sign was old, the words on it were still clear.)
因为找不到门牌,所以他迷路了。(Because he couldn't find the house number plate, he got lost.)
这家店的招牌不但好看,而且很显眼。(This shop's signboard is not only good-looking, but also very eye-catching.)

words: 签名 (qiān míng, sign one's name)
p3-17.definition-english: To sign one's name; a label or ticket
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫在纸上签了自己的名字。(The fisherman signed his own name on the paper.)
complex: 虽然渔夫不识字,但是他还是努力学签名。(Although the fisherman couldn't read, he still tried hard to learn to sign his name.)
他一边签名一边微笑。(He signs his name while smiling.)
这份文件不但要签字,而且要盖章。(This document not only needs a signature, but also needs a stamp.)

p3-17.definition-english: Ten thousand; a very large number
p3-17.sentence: 这批银子的数量超过了一万两。(The amount of silver exceeded ten thousand taels.)
complex: 因为外面下雨,所以妈妈说万一路滑要小心。(Because it's raining outside, mom said in case the road is slippery, be careful.)
哥哥一边存钱一边说要存到一万元。(Older brother saves money while saying he wants to save up to ten thousand yuan.)
这份礼物不但价值一万元,而且十分珍贵。(This gift is not only worth ten thousand yuan, but also very precious.)

words: 成千上万 (chéng qiān shàng wàn, thousands upon thousands)
p3-17.definition-english: Thousand; a large number
p3-17.sentence: 妈妈说,千万不要靠近河边。(Mom said we must never go near the riverbank.)
complex: 虽然只是一千块钱,但是对农夫来说已经很多了。(Although it was only a thousand dollars, it was already a lot for the farmer.)
因为森林里有成千上万棵树,所以空气很新鲜。(Because there are thousands upon thousands of trees in the forest, the air is very fresh.)
姐姐一边数钱一边说存了一千元。(Older sister counts money while saying she saved a thousand yuan.)

words: 加减 (jiā jiǎn, addition and subtraction)
p3-17.definition-english: To subtract; to reduce or decrease
p3-17.sentence: 老师教我们做加减法算术题。(The teacher taught us to do addition and subtraction math problems.)
complex: 虽然减法题目很多,但是他都做对了。(Although there were many subtraction problems, he got them all correct.)
因为我很喜欢数学,所以减法题目我做得很快。(Because I really like math, I do subtraction problems very quickly.)
这道题不但要用加法,而且要用减法。(This problem not only requires addition, but also requires subtraction.)

p3-17.definition-english: To calculate; to plan or intend
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫打算把捡到的银子分给大家。(The fisherman planned to share the silver he found with everyone.)
complex: 虽然算术题很难,但是他还是认真计算。(Although the arithmetic problem was difficult, he still calculated it carefully.)
他一边做算术一边检查答案对不对。(He does arithmetic while checking whether the answers are correct.)
他不但打算好好学习,而且每天练习算术。(He not only plans to study hard, but also practices arithmetic every day.)

p3-17.definition-english: To check, inspect, or examine
p3-17.sentence: 神仙检查了渔夫是不是诚实的人。(The immortal checked whether the fisherman was an honest person.)
complex: 因为要出国旅行,所以我们要先做体检。(Because we're going abroad, we need to have a physical checkup first.)
医生一边检查一边记录结果。(The doctor checks while recording the results.)
机场的安检不但严格,而且很仔细。(The airport security check is not only strict, but also very thorough.)

p3-17.definition-english: To check, examine, or investigate
p3-17.sentence: 神仙仔细查看渔夫捞起来的东西。(The immortal carefully examined what the fisherman had scooped up.)
complex: 虽然天已经黑了,但是警察还在调查案件。(Although it was already dark, the police were still investigating the case.)
因为东西不见了,所以妈妈仔细查看房间。(Because the item was missing, mom carefully looked through the room.)
老师一边查看作业一边点头。(The teacher looks through the homework while nodding.)

words: 摘果子 (zhāi guǒ zi, pick fruit)
p3-17.definition-english: To pick or take off, such as fruit or glasses
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫弯下腰摘下了河边的野花。(The fisherman bent down and picked wildflowers by the riverbank.)
complex: 虽然树很高,但是他还是爬上去摘果子。(Although the tree was tall, he still climbed up to pick fruit.)
因为花园里的花开了,所以妹妹想去摘花。(Because the flowers in the garden bloomed, younger sister wanted to go pick flowers.)
他不但摘下了眼镜,而且擦了擦眼睛。(He not only took off his glasses, but also rubbed his eyes.)

p3-17.definition-english: To lose; to be missing
p3-17.sentence: 他一不小心,失去了心爱的鱼竿。(He carelessly lost his beloved fishing rod.)
complex: 虽然他失去了心爱的鱼竿,但是他并没有放弃。(Although he lost his beloved fishing rod, he did not give up.)
妈妈一边安慰弟弟一边说不要太失望。(Mom comforts younger brother while telling him not to be too disappointed.)
他不但失去了机会,而且很难过。(He not only lost the opportunity, but also felt very sad.)

p3-17.definition-english: Gold; golden in color
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫捞到了一条美丽的金鱼。(The fisherman caught a beautiful goldfish.)
complex: 因为渔夫很诚实,所以神仙送给他一条金鱼。(Because the fisherman was honest, the immortal gave him a goldfish.)
小金鱼一边游泳一边吐泡泡。(The little goldfish swims while blowing bubbles.)
夕阳不但把天空染成金色,而且十分美丽。(The sunset not only dyed the sky golden, but also was very beautiful.)

p3-17.definition-english: To try or attempt; a test
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫决定试一试,把铁棒放进水里。(The fisherman decided to give it a try and put the iron rod into the water.)
complex: 虽然这道题很难,但是他还是想试一试。(Although this problem was difficult, he still wanted to give it a try.)
因为明天有考试,所以他今晚认真复习。(Because there's an exam tomorrow, he is studying seriously tonight.)
科学家一边做试验一边记录数据。(The scientist does the experiment while recording data.)

p3-17.definition-english: To disappear or vanish
p3-17.sentence: 神仙说完话就突然消失了。(The immortal vanished suddenly after finishing speaking.)
complex: 虽然神仙消失了,但是渔夫一直记得他的话。(Although the immortal disappeared, the fisherman always remembered his words.)
因为比赛取消了,所以大家都很失望。(Because the match was cancelled, everyone was very disappointed.)
这场比赛不但被取消了,而且改到了下星期。(This match was not only cancelled, but also rescheduled to next week.)

words: 等等 (děng děng, etc./wait a moment)
p3-17.definition-english: To wait; to await
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫每天在河边耐心地等待。(The fisherman waited patiently by the riverbank every day.)
complex: 虽然要等很久,但是渔夫还是耐心地等待。(Although he had to wait a long time, the fisherman still waited patiently.)
渔夫一边钓鱼一边耐心等候。(The fisherman fishes while patiently waiting.)
他不但耐心等候,而且始终面带微笑。(He not only waits patiently, but also always has a smile on his face.)

p3-17.definition-english: A case (legal); a plan; a pattern
p3-17.sentence: 法官正在调查一起奇怪的案件。(The judge was investigating a strange court case.)
complex: 因为案件很复杂,所以警察调查了很久。(Because the case was complicated, the police investigated for a long time.)
姐姐一边画画一边设计新的图案。(Older sister draws while designing a new pattern.)
这道题的答案不但正确,而且写得很清楚。(This question's answer is not only correct, but also clearly written.)

p3-17.definition-english: A moment; to carve; diligent
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫刻苦劳动,从不休息片刻。(The fisherman worked diligently and never rested for even a moment.)
complex: 虽然天气很冷,但是他还是刻苦地练习。(Although the weather was cold, he still practiced diligently.)
因为老师叫他的名字,所以他立刻站了起来。(Because the teacher called his name, he stood up immediately.)
他一边刻苦学习一边照顾家人。(He studies diligently while taking care of his family.)

p3-17.definition-english: To feel; to be moved or touched
p3-17.sentence: 渔夫的诚实感动了神仙。(The fisherman's honesty touched the immortal.)
complex: 虽然礼物很小,但是他心里很感动。(Although the gift was small, he was very moved inside.)
因为老师帮助了他,所以他很感谢老师。(Because the teacher helped him, he was very grateful to the teacher.)
这个故事不但很感人,而且让人感动得流泪。(This story is not only touching, but also moves people to tears.)
